items.text:
🎭 LAST MINUTE – URGENT CASTING CALL
Read All Information Before Applying

[PROJECT DESCRIPTION]

A bold new theatre stage production currently in development that will later transition into a Drama Series streaming on major Streaming Television platforms.

What it's About? 

A gritty, fast-paced contemporary thriller exploring the realities of modern life. The story dives deep into powerful human emotions including greed, envy, hatred, love, betrayal, and the pursuit of peace, delivering an intense and emotionally charged narrative designed for both stage and screen.

Each character is inspired by raw, everyday realities, bringing authenticity and depth to the performance.

Creative Tone References:

Projects with a similar grounded tone include films such as Ill Manors, City of Lights, Fish Tank, Everywhere & Nowhere, and Sugarush.

This project is being developed with a clear pathway towards an on-screen drama series aimed at major platforms including:

Netflix, Amazon Studios, Apple TV+, A24, Sky Studios, Facebook Watch, HBO, Hulu, Film4, Paramount+, Pluto TV, Plex, Mubi and ITV Studios.

🎬 ROLE |

Gender: Female

Age Range: 20's to 30's

White/Caucasian

Personality: Wild, free-spirited, bubbly, energetic City Girl

A vibrant young woman navigating the emotional chaos of city life

This role requires someone comfortable with improvisational acting and natural emotional expressions.

You aren't required to learn a script. Cast will be provided with:

A Character Backstory

A short Monologue to help you begin the performance

Improvisation guidance will be given by the Director during rehearsals

🎭 PERFORMANCE DETAILS |

Theatre Stage Performance Date:

📅 23rd March 2026

⏰ 5:00 PM

📍 UK, London

🎬 REHEARSAL DETAILS |

Rehearsals will take place in group sessions with the Director and Acting Coach.

📅 17th March 2026 – 6:30 PM

📅 22nd March 2026 – 6:30 PM

⏱ Duration: Approx. 30-40 minutes each session

📍 Camden Studio 

Further production development and rehearsal sessions may continue March–September 2026.

💰 COMPENSATION |

This production begins as a development stage play, forming the foundation for a television series adaptation.

Full production budgets and funding will be secured once the on-screen series phase moves forward onto the next stage.

This is an opportunity to join a project Early and Grow with it.

Patience and long-term vision are essential.

🌟 WHO SHOULD APPLY?

We are looking for someone who is:

Based in UK, London (Strictly ONLY)

Reliable and serious about acting

Available for the performance and rehearsals

Comfortable performing with improvisation

Open to training and development

Experience is welcome but not required.

Applicants who get selected will receive ongoing coaching, training, and mentorship to help develop them into a working professional acting brand.

📩 HOW TO APPLY?

Send The Following via Inbox OR E-Mail:

- Full Name

- Age

- Location

- Headshot and Portfolio If You Own One

- Contact Number 

- Social Media Handles (if any)

Short Introduction About Yourself Why You Want to Join As The Cast

Acting Experience (if any)

Applications will be reviewed immediately due to urgent casting requirements.

⚠️ Serious applicants Only. Availability for the dates listed is essential.

You will be sent credentials of the company and the services we provide of those who apply.

E-Mail Address: Ahmedsy_jaber@hotmail.com

🎬Urgent call for an actress (18–early 20s) for a short horror shooting tomorrow.
Film: The Cracks in Bones

Film Location: Chesterfield

Time: 12:30–8:00pm 14th Mar

I realise it’s very short notice as the original actress had to drop out last minute. If anyone knows someone suitable, please contact lilyxcrosby@gmail.com.

Thanks a lot.

items.text:
Hello all, very short notice and id be surprised if anyone is available but were currently looking for extras to attend a scene of a gathering in a pub for an England match. This is for our big dissertation uni film. We are unfortunately on a tight budget but it would be much appreciated if anyone could attend.

Casting call on Wednesday the 18th, 8:00am at the The Bell, Bell Road in East Molesey

Please contact me for more details if available, thanks!

items.text:
Łódź • Aktorzy • Raczej Non-Profit
✨SZUKAMY AKTORA✨

🎬ETIUDA SZKOŁY FILMOWEJ W ŁODZI

Poszukujemy aktorów do etiudy reżyserskiej pierwszego roku 

-Mężczyzna (50-60 lat) krótkie brązowe ale posiwiałe włosy, Najlepiej wysoki i chudy ale jesteśmy otwarci na wszystkie propozycje

-Sex-workerka (24-26 lat) naturalna, miła, szczupła z ciekawymi rysami twarzy. Musi być okej ze scenami intymnymi (mam na myśli zdjęcie koszulki)

📅Termin: 15-20.04 (bez weekendu)

📍Łódź/okolice

💸 Raczej Non-Profit ze względu na budżet , ale jak wiadomo wszystko jest do indywidualnego ustalenia

Proszę o kontakt priv lub na mail: z.kosmalska@student.filmschool.lodz.pl

items.text:
📸 Influencerzy, fotografowie i twórcy contentu!
Szukasz auta, które zrobi efekt WOW na Twojej sesji?

Mamy coś specjalnego 🔥

🚗 złote i chromowane sportowe auta🚗 idealne do zdjęć i rolek🚗 wynajem już od kilku godzin

Twoja sesja może wyglądać jak scena z filmu lub teledysku.

📷 zdjęcia🎥 TikTok / Reels💎 sesje modowe👰 sesje ślubne

Jeśli chcesz, żeby Twój content wyglądał LUKSUSOWO – napisz do nas.

📩 Rezerwacje w wiadomości prywatnej.

items.text:
Dzień dobry
Warszawa 

‼️ Uwaga‼️ 

Poszukiwana kobieta   bez wizerunku! 

Gramy lata 90!

Szukam na plan serialu!

Maria (65l.) - Kobieta większa, 

duże  / schorowane (opuchnięte) łydki, czyli ogólnie pokaźną dolną część ciała, Nie pokazujemy twarzy.

18.03 jedna scena 🎬 

w mieszkaniu jak wygląda przez okno, spaceruje ze schorowanymi nogami po korytarzu oraz wyciąga akta spod łóżka.

19.03 - jedna scena- gramy korytarz.

Stawka 120 zł za dzień- czyli  240 za oba dni- płatne po planie!

Proszę zgłaszać

Się na adres mailowy- plan@filmakcja.pl

W tytule

Proszę wpisać rolę oraz daty. W mailu prozę umieścić- imie, nazwisko, wiek, tel, wyraźne zdjęcia, w

przypadku Pank też proszę

O zdjęcie nóg.

Proszę też o podanie pełnych wymiarów, wzrostu, buta, pasa, bioder, klatki.

Odezwę się do wybranych osób.

Marta 🎥 Filmakcja.

items.text:
Hi!
My name is Harry Kit Lee and I’m a professionally trained actor with experience in theatre, film and television.

I’m currently finishing a show tomorrow in London, but then looking for my next project.

Something exciting to get my teeth in to!

Please take a look at my showreel (it needs updating), and get in touch if you have any forthcoming projects that you feel I may be right for.

Have a great weekend!

items.text:
**“MAX” CASTING CALL – SASKIA**

 

We’re looking for YOUNG BRITISH ACTORS to audition for the role of SASKIA in an upcoming short film.

 

To apply, COMPLETE THE “SASKIA” FORM IN OUR BIO and you will be sent sides for a self-tape audition.

 

21 – 30 years old.

Female-presenting.

Any ethnicity.

 

MUST BE BASED IN LONDON OR HAVE SOMEWHERE TO STAY THROUGHOUT PRODUCTION.

 

FILMING: 7th – 14th June, 2026 (subject to change).

 

No previous acting experience required. PAID OPPORTUNITY.

Travel, meal and other expenses will be completely covered in addition.

 

DEADLINE TO APPLY: Wednesday 18th March @ 23.00 pm.

DEADLINE FOR SELF-TAPES: Sunday 22nd March @ 23.00 pm.

 

If you have any questions, please feel free to get in touch at [info@bettymedia.co.uk](mailto:info@bettymedia.co.uk) 

 

We look forward to hearing from you!

 

The Betty Media team.

items.text:
🎬 LAS VEGAS OPEN CASTING CALL

We’re looking for bold, unforgettable talent for the dark comedy feature THE RISE AND FALL OF THE PIXELS written and directed by KL Martin.

Filming in Las Vegas from late April through early/mid June. This is a paid, non-union production.

If you’re a local Las Vegas actor ready to bring something real, raw, and electric to the screen, we want to see you.

📩 Submit headshot, resume, and reel (if available) to:

pixelscastinglv@gmail.com

⏳ Deadline: March 20, 2026

Agencja STARS poszukuje osób do krótkiej sesji zdjęciowej w klimacie City Break!

TYLKO OSOBY, KTÓRE JESZCZE NIE BRAŁY UDZIAŁU

 Termin: **13.03**

 Lokalizacja: **Warszawa – Śródmieście**

 Dyspozycyjność: 1h sesja wykonywana w pierwszej połowie dnia- dokładne godziny dostaną osoby wybrane.

(Zdjęcia trwają 30 minut – dokładna godzina zostanie podana po zgłoszeniu dyspozycyjności w podanym dniu).

** O projekcie:**

Sesja realizowana jest na użytek wewnętrzny klienta (bez publikacji) – w ramach projektu technologicznego mającego na celu odróżnianie zdjęć profesjonalnych od amatorskich.

 Stawka: **100 zł netto**

Płatność po podpisaniu umowy na planie oraz wykonaniu zdjęć!

 Ubiór:

Schludne, nowoczesne stylizacje, kolorowe, jak zdjęcia na insta.

 Bez bieli, czerni oraz czapek zasłaniających twarz.

 Zgłoszenia:

Wyślij email na: **o.peczak@stars-impresariat.pl** podając imię nazwisko, numer telefonu oraz aktualne zdjęcie.

Możesz zgłaszać również znajomych i rodzinę, paczkę , z którą lubisz się bawić 

Do zobaczenia na planie!

items.text:
[CASTING/CREW CALL][LA] “THE PERFECT SHOT” — A Rom-Com Short Film / El Segundo / SMC / UCLA

**Logline:** A pretentious film student, struggling to find his "authentic voice," discovers his muse (and his cluelessness) when he is forced to partner with a bubbly theatre girl for a class project.

CREW CALL: DP, 1st AC, and PA’s

CASTING CALL: Extras, 18-25

COMPENSATION: Crew  based on experience level. 

CONTACT: [Maxwell.christian.montogmery@gmail.com](mailto:Maxwell.christian.montogmery@gmail.com) 

Hello world! 

I’m a student director putting together a passion project short film this month, and I’m looking for a few key crew members to help bring this silly little rom-com to life. This is funded by ourselves (feeding crew, credit, portfolio fuel, and good vibes), but the locations are locked and the script is tight.

**The Vibe:** Think (500) Days of Summer meets the awkward sincerity of a Wes Anderson student film. It’s a funny, sweet, low-stakes story about how artists sometimes need to get out of their own heads.

**Shoot Dates:** [TBD, Prospective: March 20-23 or March 27-30th] (1-2 weekend days, plus potential pickup day)
**Locations:** El Segundo / UCLA Campus / Santa Monica College Campus

**We are currently looking for:**
* Director of Photography (DP):

Someone who loves natural light and can handle a mix of interior dialogue scenes and fun, energetic exterior walking shots. We have a specific look in mind (warm, slightly contrasty) and would like a collaborator, someone with some knowledge and perspective, but doesn't need to be an expert. We have a scene shot up in the catwalks over the main stage at SMC, so **must be okay with heights.** We may also get access to the light board to shoot some lights up into the catwalk to assist our own lighting in the scene, so a huge opportunity to experiment with both theatre and film lights to shape the look of our scenes.
* 1st AC: Need someone reliable to keep us on schedule, our image in focus, and our set transitions tight. We will likely be shooting on a mirrorless system (Sony/FX series) OR A BMPCC 6K. 
* Production Assistants (PA’s):** Eager to learn? Need set experience? This is a chill set with a small crew. Your main jobs will be crowd control at public locations, wrangling gear, and craftys/snacks.

**Special Shout-out to Santa Monica College Students:**

If you are currently at **SMC** (or know someone who is) and are an actor looking for on-set experience, **PLEASE reach out.** We are filming a key scene at the SMC Performing Arts Center and would love to populate the background with real students to make the world feel authentic.

**Compensation:** **Credit, Digital Copy, Meals/Snacks, and my undying gratitude.** This is a student/independent project intended for festival submission and portfolio reels. Open to discussion to pay DP, AC and Sound, so don't hesitate to ask! **Just a heads up that this budget is pretty stark, so nothing over $500 please. **Once we get the big bucks, we'll be more than happy to accommodate your expertise :)

**To Apply:**

Please DM me with your role of interest and a link to your portfolio/reel or IG. If you're an SMC actor, just send a headshot or a selfie and tell me your availability.

Let's make something fun!

Hi! My name is Brandi, a Northern California–based model and content creator currently available for bookings and collaborations.

I’m open to modeling, acting, lifestyle shoots, and UGC projects. With a background in marketing and brand storytelling, I also offer UGC creation and editing.

**Available for:**
• Lifestyle & commercial modeling
• Brand / product campaigns
• UGC content (photo + short-form video)
• Acting opportunities
• Content creation + editing

items.text:
LOS ANGELES… this is the very FIRST show.

The cherry-poppin’ kickoff of my brand new comedy tour and reality television series.

Yes… we are actually filming the show.

So if you’ve ever wanted to accidentally end up on television while laughing at a pastor, a porn star, and a lineup of chaotic comedians… this is your moment.

Only 28 seats.
This is an intimate VIP comedy night.

Doors open at 7PM so come early, take pictures with me and the comedians, grab autographs, say hi, and get comfortable before we start filming.

Show starts at 7:30PM.

Also show love to the venue by ordering food or drinks (two-item minimum). Keep the drinks flowing so the laughs keep coming.

If this show sells out — and it probably will — you’ll miss the very first night of the tour.

And nobody wants to be the person saying:
“I heard the first show was legendary.”

Come be part of the chaos.

🎟 Tickets: C3TIX.COM
📍 The Living Room DTLA @thelivingroomdtla

#christylove #standupcomedy #losangelescomedy #comedyshow #comedynight

items.text:
✨ Client Spotlight | The Power of Voice in Animation & Games ✨
There is something truly otherworldly about Corbett Barklie’s voice — an ethereal quality that carries emotion, story, and soul. A voice shaped by a life deeply lived in the arts, and one that feels perfectly at home in the worlds of animation, games, and immersive storytelling.

Corbett isn’t just a brilliant voice artist and actor — she is a storyteller whose performances are informed by decades of creative leadership, collaboration, and human connection. In animation and gaming, where truth, imagination, and emotional depth matter most, lived experience is everything — and Corbett brings it in abundance.

With an extensive career across the arts in the USA and Northern Ireland, Corbett blends warmth, intelligence, and quiet power with absolute professionalism on mic. She connects instinctively with audiences, delivering performances that feel grounded, expansive, and unmistakably real.

Her influence behind the scenes is just as impressive:

Founder and Director of Loretta Theatre, Executive Director of ARTS Inc., Deputy Director of Development at Center Theatre Group, consultant and assessor for the NEA, Adjunct Professor at USC School of Theatre, and a champion of bold, unexpected collaborations through her work as a producer and arts consultant.

This is proof that it’s never too late to pivot, never too late to step into a new, vital skillset — and never too late to find your voice in animation, games, and beyond.

🎙️ Ready to elevate your voiceover work?

Book one-to-one coaching with us at pblvoiceover.com, DM us, or get in touch via the website.

Recalibrate. Refocus. Unlock your full creative Voiceover power.

items.summary:
✨ Client Spotlight | The Power of Voice in Animation & Games ✨
There is something truly otherworldly about Corbett Barklie’s voice — an ethereal quality that carries emotion, story, and soul. A voice shaped by a life deeply lived in the arts, and one that feels perfectly at home in the worlds of animation, games, and immersive storytelling.

Corbett isn’t just a brilliant voice artist and actor — she is a storyteller whose performances are informed by decades of creative leadership, collaboration, and human connection. In animation and gaming, where truth, imagination, and emotional depth matter most, lived experience is everything — and Corbett brings it in abundance.

With an extensive career across the arts in the USA and Northern Ireland, Corbett blends warmth, intelligence, and quiet power with absolute professionalism on mic. She connects instinctively with audiences, delivering performances that feel grounded, expansive, and unmistakably real.

Her influence behind the scenes is just as impressive:

Founder and Director of Loretta Theatre, Executive Director of ARTS Inc., Deputy Director of Development at Center Theatre Group, consultant and assessor for the NEA, Adjunct Professor at USC School of Theatre, and a champion of bold, unexpected collaborations through her work as a producer and arts consultant.

This is proof that it’s never too late to pivot, never too late to step into a new, vital skillset — and never too late to find your voice in animation, games, and beyond.

🎙️ Ready to elevate your voiceover work?

Book one-to-one coaching with us at pblvoiceover.com, DM us, or get in touch via the website.

Recalibrate. Refocus. Unlock your full creative Voiceover power.
items.title: ✨ Client Spotlight | The Power of Voice in Animation & Games ✨

items.text:
Audition Notice
“Scrooge! (Abbreviated Version)” 

Book, Music and Lyrics by Leslie Bricusse

From A Christmas Carol by Charles Dickens

A one-hour adaptation of the crowd-pleasing holiday musical!

In 1970, renowned writer/composer/lyricist Leslie Bricusse adapted the classic Charles Dickens tale A Christmas Carol into the hit screen musical Scrooge! 

A charming stage musical, Scrooge! 

Lyons Community Theatre

Auditions: Will be held at Planet Bluegrass Lab Building(Directions), on Friday, Oct 3rd, 5-7pm; Sunday, Oct 5th,  1-3pm and Monday, Oct 6th, 5-7pm  (If none of these days or times work for you, please contact georgi.pollard@gmail.com by Sunday, Oct 5th @12pm

Performance dates:

Friday, December 12th, 2025 @7pm 

Saturday, December 13th, 2025 @2pm & 7pm

Sunday, December 14th, 2025 @2pm 

@Planet Bluegrass Wildflower Pavillion 

All auditioners  will be asked to sing 16 measures from the musical or a verse from a familiar holiday song.

We will dance a few moves and those wanting a speaking role will read from the script. Everyone is encouraged to show off your English accent!  Although not necessary, you are welcome to bring a prepared song to share.  We will have an accompanist.

Roles are Non-Union | Unpaid

LCT encourages actors of all races, ethnicities, genders, ages, and abilities all ages to audition, welcoming performers from all backgrounds.

Performers may come on any one of the days or you may sign up using the Signup Genius link

Link to Sign up for an Audition Slot:

SIGN UP LINK

https://www.signupgenius.com/go/70A0A4BA4A723ABFE3-58313489-scrooge#/

items.text:
🎭 Stage Production in Progress. Your seat might be on the stage.

We’re inviting purpose-driven creatives who are ready to serve, grow, and collaborate. We’re looking for actors, singers, dancers, musicians, writers, and production team members who value faith, excellence, and unity over spotlight. If you’re committed, teachable, and desire to use your gift to glorify God, this stage is being prepared for you.

Visit our website and register to join the movement and be part of the stage production in progress: servingeverynationtogether.com ✨

items.text:
**Casting Call - Volunteer, Non-union, IMDB credit, Snippet**

I'm casting for a comedy film- Vijay Finds His Dating Mojo. I plan to send this film to film festivals and use it as a proof of concept for a feature film. 

**Synopsis-** An immigrant from India, Vijay, takes services from a manipulative dating coach, Jason. After several failures, Vijay decides to discard pickup lines and pretensions and be himself. He meets Sophia, and they hit it off. Will him being honest work out or backfire?

**Casting:**
Jason (23-35) Caucasian, charismatic, manipulative, eloquent, materialistic, pushy, and cynical. He is a dating guru who teaches Vijay dating lessons. Shoot on 11th April. 

Sophia (23-35) Strong and confident, normal to higher-weight, sassy, eloquent, bold, had a recent breakup, and impulsive. Any ethnicity. She had a recent break and is now going through a rebound. Shoot on 11th and 12th April. 

Rumi (23-35) Self-assured, quick-witted, open-minded, and straightforward. Asian. Started a new job as an accountant and overworked. Shoot on 12th April. 

Jessica (23-32) Beautiful, party girl, and is fashionable. Any ethnicity. Shoot on 12th April. 

Christine (22-33) Charming, any ethnicity. Shoot on 12th April. 

Additional Characters

Tyler- 25-55, honest, humble, and attentive. Any ethnicity.

Bartender experience is plus but not must. Shoot on 12th April. 

Vijay's Father- 45-65, conservative, Southasian, Indian accent (preferably). shoot on 11th April. 

Vijay's Mother- 45-65, conservative, Southasian, Indian accent (preferably). Shoot on 11th April. 

Vijay's date- 35-45, Normal to higher weight, any ethnicity. Shoot on 12th April. 

Gym Girl- 25-35, in good shape, any ethnicity. Shoot on 11th April. 

People in Bar- Men and Women in their 20s and 30s. Need 3 women and 3 men. Any ethnicity. Shoot on 12th April. 

**Location:** Vancouver Downtown and Surrey/Langely

**Date:** 11th and 12th April, 2026

**Pay:** Volunteer, IMDB credit, Snippet

**To Apply:**
Please email **tomar.gautam2@yahoo.com** with:
• Resume
• Headshots
• Demo reel (if available)

Subject line: **“Characater and your name”**

items.text:
Hallo zusammen,

für einen globalen Werbespot mit globalen Nutzungsrechten sind wir aktuell auf der Suche nach einer vierköpfigen Familie.

Es handelt sich um einen Werbespot für einen Drohnen-Controller. Der Dreh ist rein visuell und fängt natürliche Familienmomente im Lifestyle-Kontext ein.

Gesucht werden:
• Mama
• Papa
• Junge (8–13 Jahre)
• Mädchen (8–13 Jahre)

Wichtige Voraussetzungen:
• Keine sichtbaren Tattoos
• Keine Piercings

Drehorte: Südbayern und Karwendel (Tyrol)

Drehtage: 
• 2 Drehtage (Outdoor) 
• Anreise am Abend vor dem ersten Drehtag
• Drehschluss am zweiten Drehtag nach Sonnenuntergang
• Drehzeitraum: Zwischen 20.03.-29.03.

Bei Interesse gerne Fotos, Angebot, Alter und Wohnort an: contact@sindynelia.de

Vielen Dank und liebe Grüße
Sindy

items.text:
Do serialu „Uroczysko” poszukujemy aktorów do nowych ról.
🎬 Aktor zawodowy
wiek 35–43 lat
Zdjęcia: 18, 25, 26 oraz 31 marca we Wrocławiu.

🎬 Dwójka epizodystów (małżeństwo)
wiek 50–58 lat
Kobieta – wulkan energii
Mężczyzna – jej totalne przeciwieństwo
Zdjęcia: 25 oraz 31 marca we Wrocławiu.

💰 Stawka ustalana indywidualnie.

📩 Zgłoszenia prosimy przesyłać na:
casting.zgrani@gmail.com

W treści:
• imię i nazwisko
• wiek
• numer kontaktowy
• wideowizytówka
• próbka aktorska

Skontaktujemy się z wybranymi osobami.

items.text:
HALLO TRÓJMIASTO - GDYNIA REWA
FILM FABULARNY LATA 70 - O Polskim bohaterze dla znanej platformy streamingowej Szukamy statystów

31.03.2026 WTOREK

Panowie 18 -35 lat ( Jako kandydat na Pilota - w scenie będzie trzeba biegać)

STAWKA do potwierdzenia

CHARAKTERYZACJA 29.03.2026

Wytyczne charakteryzacji:

- panowie na mundurowych mogą mieć włosy krótsze, odsłonięte uszy i kark, ale niewygoleni maszynką. Ogoleni na gładko. Bez tatuaży 

Zgłoszenia poproszę na adres: jo@podtytulem.pl

W tytule: G31

W treści: imię i nazwisko, wiek, nr telefonu, miejscowość + wymiary: wzrost, klatka, pas, biodra, rozmiar ubrania i buta

W załączniku: ZDJĘCIE TWARZY I SYLWETKI: tylko z dnia zgłoszenia + panowie zdjęcie twarzy z profilu

ZDJĘCIE TWARZY - portretowe selfie w dziennym świetle, na wprost, patrząc w obiektyw. Bez żadnych filtrów. Bez okularów. Bez nakrycia głowy. Kolorowe.

ZDJĘCIE SYLWETKI – aktualne, cała sylwetka

SERDECZNIE ZAPRASZAMY

items.text:
CASTING CALL - JOIN OUR NEXT PANTO!
YORKSHIRE

We’re looking for fabulous new faces to join A Roman Rumble – The Rude Panto, touring across Yorkshire, Nottinghamshire and beyond from November 2026 to January 2027.

We’re casting:

- Felix Flavious - The silly boy !!
- Chorus / Guard / handmaiden

We welcome all backgrounds, body types & experience levels. Must be up for a laugh, willing to sing & dance (badly is fine!) and give it your all.

This is unpaid, volunteer work – just like the rest of us. We do it for the love of it, not the money. All income goes back into making the show more brilliant and bonkers each year.

We’ve been proudly described as “abhorrent satire masquerading as pantomime.”

We call it mega fabby ace brill.

Message me or email me - faroutrachael@gmail.com to find out more.

items.text:
CASTING CALL – FAULTLINE (Short Film)  
URGENT: Casting Midlands-based actors for late‑March shoot

Hi everyone,
I’m a final-year Film Production student at the University of Derby, urgently casting for my graduation short film Faultline - a gritty coming-of-age drama set in 1980s Derby. The story follows a troubled teenage boy torn between gang loyalty and the last person fighting for him: his grandmother.

We are looking for Midlands-based actors for several lead, supporting, and extra roles, with self-tapes needed as soon as possible.

Project type: Student short film
Filming locations: Stoke & surrounding Midlands areas
Shoot period: 22nd to the 28th of March
 
ROLES AVAILABLE

 

SCOTT (Playing age 16–20)

Accent: Derby/Stoke (Midlands)

A tough, emotionally guarded teenager drawn into the local skinhead scene. Beneath the bravado, he is vulnerable and conflicted, forced to choose between loyalty to his gang and the possibility of change.

**Note:** Actor must be comfortable shaving their head on screen for one scene.

SI / HENNO / SHAW / DAZ (Playing age 16–21)

Accent: Derby/Stoke (Midlands)

Members of a local skinhead gang. Intimidating, confrontational, and fiercely loyal to their group.

**Note:** Actors must be comfortable shaving their heads for the role.

**EXTRAS**

Teenagers & School Students (Playing age 16–21)
Accent: Non speaking role

Multiple background roles for town and school scenes. Must be comfortable in 1980s period costume.

**Please Note**

This is a low-budget student production and unfortunately unpaid. Travel expenses will be covered and food will be provided on shoot days.

 Auditions will be via self-tape, with shortlisted actors invited to an in-person callback in Derby.

 Applicants under 18 will require parental/guardian consent.

 To apply, please email: saskianatalyafilms@outlook.com with your headshot, CV, showreel (if available), playing age, and availability for the end of March.

 Thank you, and please feel free to share :)

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of ‎text that says '‎FAULT F 1 عو ر - - Ε COMING COMINGSOON SOON A SHORT DRAMAFILM DRAMA FILM‎'‎

topComments.text: You can't expect people to shave their heads for free, I get it's no/low budget but that's literally part of their body you expect them to alter without compensation or incentive...you would likely have better luck casting already balding/shaved people rather than "we expect you to shave your head, but cannot pay you for it"

Absolute no 🚩
Advertise for the look by all means... but you cannot expect a professional actor to shave their head!! Thats a huge compensation to their career.

items.text:
Another Note From Me As The Moderator 
Hey Guys, Hope you're well ☺️. This is personal but I just want to get it off my chest: 

In regards to my previous note as it came to the topic of age & the "elderly" label in the industry, as I expected, it ruffled some feathers 🪶 and got backlash.

However, please do understand that I am the moderator.  I can say what I want and as I please. I can post it in this group if I feel as if it needs to be said for the sake of making clear how things will operate in the group. 

I will also say it in a straightforward, direct & forthright manner.  That is my personality and as I feel that that is a very appropriate skill that is needed for this job as a moderator. If you don't like that, tough luck. I won't apologise nor back down and cater to your preferences as a result.

Finally, in regards to member removal from the group, I want to make it firmly clear again that I AM THE MODERATOR!!!!!!. I have the authority to make decisions regarding group management, including removing members if necessary. If I see you make an unacceptable comment on any post or if someone reports you to the admin team because of an unacceptable comment or post you make, you'll be removed & banned from the group with immediate effect. 

Once you're gone, you're gone. You're not coming back or re-entering the group & that's final. If you're unhappy with that decision, that's something you'll need to address personally on your own and move forward from. It's not my problem. It's YOURS 👀👀👀👀👀👀!!!!!!!

topComments.text: Of course you can say whatever you like. I just profoundly disagree with you, and I would never put terminology like that on a casting call I was putting out. I'd find it intensely disrespectful.

Hi Emmanuel
I assume from your statement that you are the founder of Casting Calls UK and its sole authority. 
I read your previous post and a couple of responses to it, none of which I thought unreasonable. Perhaps you received some comments or direct messages that were. 
I am an experienced actor, who may reasonably considered elderly. In my view the issue with the term elderly is that it means different things to different people and should therefore be avoided in casting notices unless supported by clarification of what the poster means by “elderly”. 
Someone in their early 20s may perceive someone aged 50 as elderly, but in my experience many do not. Someone aged 70 may perceive someone aged 50 as young. It is relative to each individual’s age, life experience and perception and, as such, simply requires clarification. The use of a term that means different things to different people is unhelpful and can be misleading. That’s all.
My best wishes to all readers, whatever your ages.

items.text:
🎬 **ACTORS WANTED – PAID TRAILER SHOOT**

I’m a film director casting **male actor** for a **cinematic trailer (not the full movie)**.

This is a **paid shoot** and a chance to be part of a visually strong project that will be used for **investor pitching and promotion**.

⚠️ Important:
This is **NOT casting for the full feature film**. This is strictly for 6 different trailers. These trailers are being produced as high-impact pitch trailers to support feature film development.

PROJECT SLATE
• ANIA – emotional action thriller
• INTERFICIENTE – psychological revenge thriller
• A MOTHER’S LOVE – dramatic crime thriller
• LOUD SILENCE – psychological suspense
• THE HITMAN – dark comedy crime film
• AMARANTHINE STAMMER – stylized action thriller

SEEKING MALE PERFORMERS FOR ROLES INCLUDING:
• Lead protagonists
• Antagonists / crime figures
• Psychological drama roles
• Tactical / action characters
• Supporting dramatic roles

**What you get:**
• Paid role
• High-quality footage for your reel
• Short shoot (1–5 days)
• Professional production environment

Looking for:
Strong presence, emotional range, and confidence on camera.

Send:
Headshot + any footage (if you have it)

Email: [Twistedfilms@yahoo.com](mailto:Twistedfilms@yahoo.com)

ALL AUDITIONS WILL BE EMAILED TO SELECTED CANDIDATES WITH DATES AND NYC STUDIO LOCATION.

 

ROLLS

** **

**🎬 ANIA — Trailer Character Breakdown**

**1.  MIKHAIL**

**Gender:** Male
**Age Range:** 35–55
**Type:** Calm but dangerous antagonist Russian

**Character description**
A controlled and intimidating criminal figure. He speaks calmly while threatening violence. He is focused on retrieving a mysterious disc.

**Trailer performance requirements**
* Sitting in shadow (menacing presence)
* Gun intimidation scene
* Controlled dialogue delivery

**Key line in trailer**

“Where is my fucking disc?”

**🎬 INTERFICIENTE — Trailer Character Breakdown**

**1.** ** RICHARD TWOHANDSFEAL**

**Gender:** Male - Caucasian
**Age Range:** 40–60
**Type:** Serial predator / central villain

**Character description**
Richard is a sadistic serial rapist whose crimes create the ripple effect that drives Victoria’s transformation. In the trailer he appears as a shadowy, manipulative figure tied to multiple unsolved crimes.

**Trailer performance requirements**
* Menacing presence
* Disturbing calm demeanor
* Violent intimidation

Key moment:

“Don’t you fucking scream…”

**2. UNCLE**

**Gender:** Male – Caucasian
**Age Range:** 40–60
**Type:** Supporting emotional role

**Character description**
A family member attempting to comfort Victoria after the traumatic events affecting the family.

**Trailer function**
Provides emotional grounding during the loss sequence.

**3. RODNEY**

**Gender:** Male – African American
**Age Range:** 19–25
**Type:** Criminal suspect

**Character description**
A man captured and interrogated by Victoria as she hunts down the perpetrators connected to the crimes.

**Trailer performance requirements**
* Tied interrogation scene
* Fearful reaction

**4. COREY**

**Gender:** Male - Hispanic
**Age Range:** 25–30
**Type:** Secondary criminal target

**Character description**
Another suspect confronted by Victoria as she continues hunting for answers.

Key line:

“What the fuck you want!?”
# 🎬 A MOTHER’S LOVE — Trailer Character Breakdown
## 1. JEROME

**Gender:** Male African American
**Age Range:** 25–40
**Type:** Trusted friend / tragic target

**Character description**
Jerome is a man Maria cares about deeply. The trailer deliberately makes the audience like him before revealing that he is the person Maria must kill to save her son.

**Trailer performance requirements**

·       Friendly, warm presence

·       Trusting relationship with Maria

·       Appears unaware of the threat

Example dialogue:

“You and Tito are number one in my book…”

This moment **creates the moral dilemma**.
# 🎬 THE HITMAN — Trailer Character Breakdown
## 1. ZACK (Lead)

**Gender:** Male
**Age Range:** 30–45
**Type:** Professional assassin / dark comedic lead

**Character description**
Zack is a disciplined hitman whose life depends on precision and control. The trailer shows his routine collapsing as a series of small problems spiral into chaos on the day he must complete a job.

The character is built around **contrast**:

·       Calm professional assassin

·       Completely overwhelmed by normal life problems

**Trailer performance requirements**

·       Controlled professional demeanor

·       Physical comedy (frustration moments)

·       Silent reactions / facial acting

·       Gun handling

·       Transition from comedic tone to serious tension

Key trailer moment:

Zack tries to stay calm as everything around him fails before his assassination job.
# 2. DAVID (Target)

**Gender:** Male
**Age Range:** 35–60
**Type:** Assassination target

**Character description**
David is the man Zack has been hired to kill. He appears during the diner scene and later when Zack begins stalking him.

The trailer deliberately keeps David mysterious to preserve the tension.

**Trailer performance requirements**

·       Calm diner interaction

·       Walking / being followed

·       Reaction moment before the gunshot
# 3. POLICE OFFICER

**Gender:** Male or Female
**Age Range:** 30–50

**Character description**
An officer briefly interacts with Zack during the street scene when he is acting strangely.

Key moment:

“Sir… are you ok?”

 

**🎬 AMARANTHINE STAMMER — Trailer Character Breakdown**
# 1. STAMMER (Amaranthine)

**Gender:** Male
**Age Range:** 25–40
**Type:** Unpredictable / eccentric operative

**Character description**
Stammer is a mysterious and unsettling character whose speech impediment becomes a defining element of the trailer. He appears calm yet dangerous and repeatedly attempts to introduce himself but gets interrupted by the trailer’s rapid editing.

His awkward and strange behavior becomes a **signature hook of the film**.

**Trailer performance requirements**

·       Unique speech pattern (Stutter/Tourette delivery)

·       Calm yet bizarre presence

·       Reaction moments under threat

Example line fragments:

“M m m my na—”
“I I I’ve b b been s s sent…”

🎬 AMARANTHINE STAMMER trailer

Signature moment:

“TINY LITTLE WIENER!”
# 2. UKUFA

**Gender:** Male
**Age Range:** 35–55
**Type:** Commanding authority figure

**Character description**
Ukufa enters the trailer as a calm and controlled presence amid the chaos. His role appears to be a leader or tactical authority who understands the situation better than everyone else.

**Trailer performance requirements**

·       Slow, confident movement

·       Strong authoritative voice

·       Minimal but impactful dialogue

Key moment:

“Amaranthine… are you here?”

Later:

“You are both in the same team…”
# 3. SOLDIERS / GUARDS

**Gender:** Mixed
**Age Range:** 25–45

**Character description**
Armed personnel surrounding the situation. They provide the action environment and tension through gunfire, tactical movement, and confrontation.

**Trailer performance requirements**

·       Tactical movement

·       Gunfight choreography

·       Background action reactions

items.text:
“MAX” CASTING CALL

 

We’re looking for YOUNG BRITISH ACTORS to audition for the role of MAX in an upcoming short film.

 

To apply, COMPLETE THE FORM IN OUR BIO and you will be sent sides for a self-tape audition.

 

18 – 30 years old.

Male-presenting.

Any ethnicity.

 

MUST BE BASED IN LONDON OR HAVE SOMEWHERE TO STAY THROUGHOUT PRODUCTION.

 

FILMING: 7th – 14th June, 2026 (subject to change).

 

We’re especially interested in hearing from males with lean builds, under 6’0.

 

No previous acting experience required. PAID OPPORTUNITY.

Travel, meal and other expenses will be completely covered in addition.

 

DEADLINE TO APPLY: Monday 16th March @ 23.00 pm.

DEADLINE FOR SELF-TAPES: Friday 20th March @ 23.00 pm.

 

If you have any questions, please feel free to get in touch at [info@bettymedia.co.uk](mailto:info@bettymedia.co.uk) 

 

We look forward to hearing from you!

 

The Betty Media team.
items.summary:
“MAX” CASTING CALL

 

We’re looking for YOUNG BRITISH ACTORS to audition for the role of MAX in an upcoming short film.

 

To apply, COMPLETE THE FORM IN OUR BIO and you will be sent sides for a self-tape audition.

 

18 – 30 years old.

Male-presenting.

Any ethnicity.

 

MUST BE BASED IN LONDON OR HAVE SOMEWHERE TO STAY THROUGHOUT PRODUCTION.

 

FILMING: 7th – 14th June, 2026 (subject to change).

 

We’re especially interested in hearing from males with lean builds, under 6’0.

 

No previous acting experience required. PAID OPPORTUNITY.

Travel, meal and other expenses will be completely covered in addition.

 

DEADLINE TO APPLY: Monday 16th March @ 23.00 pm.

DEADLINE FOR SELF-TAPES: Friday 20th March @ 23.00 pm.

 

If you have any questions, please feel free to get in touch at [info@bettymedia.co.uk](mailto:info@bettymedia.co.uk) 

 

We look forward to hearing from you!

 

The Betty Media team.

items.text:
CASTING CALL - JOIN OUR NEXT PANTO!
YORKSHIRE 

We’re looking for fabulous new faces to join A Roman Rumble – The Rude Panto, touring across Yorkshire, Nottinghamshire and beyond from November 2026 to January 2027.

We’re casting:

- Felix Flavious - The silly boy !!

- Chorus / Guard / handmaiden

We welcome all backgrounds, body types & experience levels. Must be up for a laugh, willing to sing & dance (badly is fine!) and give it your all.

This is unpaid, volunteer work – just like the rest of us. We do it for the love of it, not the money. All income goes back into making the show more brilliant and bonkers each year.

We’ve been proudly described as “abhorrent satire masquerading as pantomime.”

We call it mega fabby ace brill.

Message me or email me - faroutrachael@gmail.com to find out more.

CREATIVES WANTED. Step into purpose and growth. 🎭✨

We’re inviting singers, dancers, actors, musicians, writers, creatives, and artists of all kinds to be part of a huge stage production.

This is more than a performance. It’s a learning experience.

✨ Training, guidance, and creative development will be provided

✨ Grow in skill, discipline, teamwork, and purpose

✨ Use your gifts in a meaningful, mission-driven environment

Whether you’re experienced or still discovering your craft, there’s room to learn, train, and rise together.

Message us to learn more and take your first step into this journey.🌍✨

items.text:
Good Afternoon,

My name is Anyiah, and I am a graduate student at the USC School of Cinematic Arts as well as the writer and director of the upcoming MFA short film *The Exchange.* I am currently looking for **LA-based actors and crew members** to join the project.

**Shooting dates:** April 4th – 6th and April 11th – 12th.

Please see the graphic for more details about the film. If you are interested in **auditioning or joining the crew**, please scan the QR code in the graphic or complete the appropriate Google interest form using the links below. Additional information about the film, production details, and audition or crew requirements can be found in the forms.

Please note that this is an **unpaid opportunity due to school requirements.**

The interest forms are due **March 22nd at 11:59 PM.**

**Cast Interest Form:** [https://forms.gle/TXtj8FxYw551oZJH7](https://forms.gle/TXtj8FxYw551oZJH7)
**Crew Interest Form:** [https://forms.gle/h8bkR91CtFhCyEMv8](https://forms.gle/h8bkR91CtFhCyEMv8)

**CASTING CALL — AKTOR DO ROLI WIZERUNKOWEJ (FINTECH PROJECT)**

Do realizacji wizerunkowego spotu dla młodej firmy z branży fintech poszukujemy aktora:

**Profil:**
* mężczyzna w wieku 30–45 lat
* biznesowy, profesjonalny wygląd
* naturalna prezencja przed kamerą
* komunikatywny język angielski (min. poziom B2/C1 — wymagane nagranie próbki)

**Szczegóły:**
* zdjęcia w Warszawie
* zaangażowanie: ok. pół dnia zdjęciowego
* termin: do ustalenia (w najbliższym czasie)
* produkcja wizerunkowa / corporate style

Prosimy o przesyłanie:
* aktualnych zdjęć (portret + sylwetka)
* krótkiej próbki wideo w języku angielskim
* informacji o dostępności

Zgłoszenia prosimy wysyłać w wiadomości prywatnej

items.text:
WARSAW - THIS SUNDAY

👻 GHOSTED
A stand-up comedy show by Bianca Lala

Ever sent a “hey 🙂”…
and received complete spiritual silence?

Ghosted is a fast, sharp and painfully funny comedy show about modern dating unread messages, emotional typing bubbles, situationships, and the mysterious art of disappearing.

Bianca Lala dives into dating disasters, cultural misunderstandings, soft heartbreaks and very hard screenshots with jokes that land exactly where your last situationship still lives.

Come laugh at the awkwardness.
Come heal a little.
Come realise it wasn’t just you.

(It was definitely also them.)

🗓 This Sunday  March 15
⏰ 6:00 PM
📍 Południk 2.0, Warsaw

Perfect for:
• single people
• complicated people
• happily taken people who still enjoy the stories

If you’ve ever been ghosted…
this show finally texts you back.

🎟 Tickets
https://fienta.com/pl/ghosted-with-bianca-lala

✨ Bonus event the same day

At 4:00 PM, Bianca is also hosting an intimate workshop for artists:

Branding as an Artist - Find Your Voice, Shape Your Style

Perfect for comedians, performers, and creatives who want to stand out without sounding like a corporate brand.

🎟 Workshop tickets
https://fienta.com/pl/branding-as-an-artist-169889

items.text:
Tomorrow night we finally premiere our latest promo for Kick Ass Film Fest. 

Doors open at 6:30pm at Cottonwood Center For the Arts. Other local filmmakers will be showing their films as well.

sharedPost.text:
The official poster for our Blood and Water 007 promo is finally here! A huge shoutout to Jacob Rivera for the sexy design and a massive thank you to our phenomenal cast and crew—your tireless hard work made this vision a reality. We are so proud to share this project with the Kick Ass Film Fest community and celebrate the local talent that brought it to life.

Join us for the official premiere tomorrow, March 11th, at 6:30 PM at the Cottonwood Center for the Arts. They will also be showcasing several other incredible short films from talented local filmmakers, so come out and celebrate the entire local film scene on the big screen! For those who can’t make it in person, Blood and Water will be officially released online this Monday, March 16th. We can’t wait to see you there!

#kickassfilmfest #coloradofilm #jamesbond #film #filmfestival

items.text:
**Title:** Room 988

**Genre:** Drama

**Logline:** A suicidal hospital janitor must face her demons when a woman, who lost her son to suicide, refuses to leave the room the janitor has to clean.

**Roles:**

*Summer*, 20s Female: A hospital janitor who’s always been a problem. She's cycled through psychiatrists and therapists, but nothing’s gotten better. She’s in so much pain, and suicide seems like the only way to make it stop.

*The Woman* 50s, Female: A strong-willed career woman whose life was turned upside down when her adult son died by suicide. Now she‘s a mess and she can’t bring herself to leave the room her son died in.

# **WE HAVE CASTED ALL ROLES!!**

**Director:** Holly Mathews 

**Producer/Writer:** Theo Henderson

**Production Type:** Student Film

**Contact Information:** Please contact by email  theo.b.henderson@gmail.com

**Run Time:** Short (4-5 min)

**Compensation:** $150 flat rate.

**Union Status: **Non-Union

**Audition Information: **We will be holding in person chemistry reads in early March. We do not have concrete dates for these at this time. 

**Shooting Schedule:** we are filming March 16th and 17th from 8am-4pm.

**Filming Location:** Auraria Campus, MSU Denver Nursing Simulation Lab.

**Project Description:** If you are interested, please scan the QR code or click the link in the comments to submit a self tape. We are hoping to get all self tapes in by February 28th!

**Title:** Room 988

**Genre:** Drama

**Logline:** A suicidal hospital janitor must face her demons when a woman, who lost her son to suicide, refuses to leave the room the janitor has to clean.

**Roles:**

*Summer*, 20s Female: A hospital janitor who’s always been a problem. She's cycled through psychiatrists and therapists, but nothing’s gotten better. She’s in so much pain, and suicide seems like the only way to make it stop.

*The Woman* 50s, Female: A strong-willed career woman whose life was turned upside down when her adult son died by suicide. Now she‘s a mess and she can’t bring herself to leave the room her son died in.

# **WE HAVE CASTED ALL ROLES!!**

**Director:** Holly Mathews 

**Producer/Writer:** Theo Henderson

**Production Type:** Student Film

**Contact Information:** Please contact by email  theo.b.henderson@gmail.com

**Run Time:** Short (4-5 min)

**Compensation:** $150 flat rate.

**Union Status: **Non-Union

**Audition Information: **We will be holding in person chemistry reads in early March. We do not have concrete dates for these at this time. 

**Shooting Schedule:** we are filming March 16th and 17th from 8am-4pm.

**Filming Location:** Auraria Campus, MSU Denver Nursing Simulation Lab.

**Project Description:** If you are interested, please scan the QR code or click the link in the comments to submit a self tape. We are hoping to get all self tapes in by February 28th!

items.title: CASTING

items.text:
Casting a short student film following 24 year old Mikey who becomes consumed by the growing anxiety that he is running out of time. While everyone around him seem to be moving ahead in life. After receiving a watch he believes is bad luck, it's constant ticking reflects his fear and turns his routines into a race he cant escape.

Through the contrast of his carefree best friend. Skylar he begins to question the pressure he puts on himself. When the watch stops, he realises his fear of falling behind was more limiting that time itself.

This is a visually driven, deeply relatable short film exploring the "quarter-life crisis," the weight of modern expectations, and learning how to finally breathe. We are looking for talented, passionate actors to bring this psychological and emotional journey to life.

Please note: As this is a student production, it is an unpaid role. However, it is a fantastic opportunity to collaborate with an ambitious crew in Liverpool

IF YOU HAVE ANY QUESTIONS PLEASE MESSAGE ME OR IF YOU WANT MORE INFORMATION ABOUT THE PROJECT PLEASE CHECK OUR MANDY POST 

https://www.mandy.com/aa/project/3114924/catching-time/

Director: Manessa Redford (Vancouver Film School)

Logline:

A casual night between friends takes a tense turn when a racially coded comment sparks a confrontation about race, privilege, and lived experience.

Roles:

NOVIA – Black female, 19–29

DANIEL – White male, 19–29

JANE – Mixed / light-skinned Black female, 19–29

JONAH – White male, 19–29

Shoot Dates: April 11–12

Location: Vancouver

Non-Union | IMDb credit | Demo reel material

Submit headshot + resume to:

manessaredford@icloud.com

Full casting breakdown attached.

Calling All Screenwriters Development Funding Available for Qualified Screenwriters:

Hello Screenwriters,
If you’re a Screenwriter, whether you're a beginner or an experienced Screenwriter and you're serious about bringing your script to life, we have an opportunity for you.

We are currently working with partners who can help Screenwriters secure development funding to move their project toward pre-production.

To qualify for this opportunity, Screenwriters must have a credit score of 680 or higher.
If you are serious about turning your vision into reality and want to explore funding options, please contact:

Clay Walker
SAG-AFTRA Member
Actor | Producer | Executive Producer
CEO & Founder
Steven Walker Productions

Phone: 1-888-643-6933

Based in Colorado, USA

items.text:
Casting dla rodzin -CAŁA POLSKA
🚨 CASTING DO NOWEGO PROGRAMU TELEWIZYJNEGO! 🚨

Produkcja ogólnopolskiego programu telewizyjnego poszukuje rodzin z całej Polski, które chciałyby przeżyć wyjątkową przygodę i wziąć udział w projekcie pokazującym, jak bardzo mogą różnić się codzienne realia życia.

👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 Kogo szukamy?

Szukamy dwóch typów rodzin:

🔹 Rodzin żyjących skromnie, które każdego dnia mierzą się z finansowymi wyzwaniami, ale mają w sobie dużo ciepła, energii i autentyczności.

🔹 Rodzin bardzo dobrze sytuowanych, prowadzących komfortowe życie, które są otwarte na nowe doświadczenia i chciałyby na chwilę spojrzeć na codzienność z zupełnie innej perspektywy.

To niezwykła okazja, aby poznać inny świat, przeżyć coś wyjątkowego i pokazać prawdziwe życie polskich rodzin.

💰 Co oferujemy?

✔ wynagrodzenie finansowe za udział w programie

✔ pełne wsparcie produkcji podczas realizacji

✔ niezapomnianą przygodę i wyjątkowe doświadczenie

📍 Szukamy rodzin z całej Polski

📩 Jak się zgłosić?

Wyślij zgłoszenie na mail: dwierodziny@gmail.com

W wiadomości podaj:

• imiona i wiek domowników

• miejscowość

• krótkie nagranie telefonem (kilka zdań o Waszej rodzinie i sytuacji życiowej)

• numer telefonu do kontaktu

✨ Może to właśnie Wasza rodzina stanie się częścią tego wyjątkowego programu!

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'CASTING! DO NOWEGO PROGRAMU TV! Rodziny w trudnej sytuacji finansowej. SZUKAMY RODZIN DO ZAMIANY ŻYCIA! Zamożne rodziny z luksusowym życiem Przeżyj niezwykłą przygodę i zobacz życie z innej perspektywy! Wysokie Pełne wynagrodzenie! wsparcie produkcji! ZGŁOŠ SIĘ TERAZ! dwierodziny dwierodziny@gmail.com @gmail.co Telefon Filmik zgłoszeniowy!'

items.text:
**CASTING CALL — AKTOR DO ROLI WIZERUNKOWEJ (FINTECH PROJECT)**

Do realizacji wizerunkowego spotu dla młodej firmy z branży fintech poszukujemy aktora:

**Profil:**
* mężczyzna w wieku 30–45 lat
* biznesowy, profesjonalny wygląd
* naturalna prezencja przed kamerą
* komunikatywny język angielski (min. poziom B2/C1 — wymagane nagranie próbki)

**Szczegóły:**
* zdjęcia w Warszawie
* zaangażowanie: ok. pół dnia zdjęciowego

items.text:
**CASTING CALL - Kinderrolle (Junge, 6-8 Jahre)**

Liebe filminteressierte Familien,

für unseren Kurzfilm „Death Drive“ (AT) von Studierenden der Filmuniversität Babelsberg und der Freien Universität Berlin suchen wir einen Jungen im Spielalter von 6–8 Jahren für die Hauptrolle.

**Details zum Projekt:**
• Drehzeitraum: Ende April 2026
• Voraussichtliche Drehtage: 18. & 19. April sowie 25. & 26. April 2026
• Insgesamt ca. 4 Drehtage in Berlin/Brandenburg
• Keine schauspielerische Vorerfahrung notwendig

• Keine Gage

**Bewerbung:**
Bitte sendet 2–3 aktuelle, natürliche Fotos (Porträt & Ganzkörper – keine Filter, keine professionellen Fotos nötig) sowie ein kurzes Vorstellungsvideo (einfach mit dem Handy aufgenommen) an: [deathdrive.produktion@gmail.com](mailto:deathdrive.produktion@gmail.com)

Bei Anfrage können wir euch gerne mehr Informationen sowie das Drehbuch zukommen lassen. Wir freuen uns sehr über eure Einsendungen und Tipps!

Viele Grüße
Laura

items.text:
**GDAŃSK (nie zwracamy za dojazd i nocleg) **

🎥 **CASTING - NAGRANIA **🎥

Szukamy **4 osób (kobiety i mężczyźni, wiek 40+)** do nagrania krótkich filmów reklamowych dla marek **Yerbador** oraz **Sakuro Matcha** - najlepsza Matcha i Yerba na polskim rynku.

Nagrania będą realizowane w formie **krótkich rolek do social mediów**. Sceny będą proste i naturalne - inspirowane codziennymi sytuacjami. Każda osoba wystąpi samodzielnie i w innej wynajętej przestrzeni.

**Kogo szukamy:**
* osób, które **czują się swobodnie przed kamerą**
* potrafią **naturalnie i płynnie mówić**
* mile widziane doświadczenie, ale **nie jest konieczne**

Teksty będą **przygotowane i wyświetlane na prompterze.**

**Szczegóły nagrania:**
📍Gdańsk/Gdynia
⏱czas zdjęć: ok. 6 godzin
📅 termin: do ustalenia indywidualnie
💵 stawka: 200 zł do ręki po zdjęciach (nasza agencja nie pochwala takim stawkom, ale nie mamy na to wpływu)

**Pola eksploatacji:** bez ograniczeń terytorialnych, ilościowych i czasowych.

**ZGŁOSZENIA:**
📩 yokan.std@gmail.com
**Tytuł maila:** CASTING - Yerba

**W treści maila:** imię, wiek, numer telefonu, aktualne zdjęcie twarzy oraz aktualne zdjęcie całej sylwetki **+ najważniejsze:** krótkie nagranie, na którym Cię słychać jak się wypowiadasz - luźna wypowiedź w stylu vlogowym. Nagranie może być wykonane telefonem. Najlepiej wrzuć film na **YouTube jako link niepubliczny** i prześlij nam link w zgłoszeniu.

**+ Dyspozycyjność **- przynajmniej w marcu, określ ją mniej więcej. Jakie dni i godziny na tak, jakie definitywnie na nie.

🎥 Zapraszamy do zgłoszeń. 🎥

**WARSZAWA 21 marca**

**film fabularny**

**stawka 120 zł gotówką po planie**

Do filmu fabularnego o początkach kariery **Adama Małysza**  poszukuję **Statystów w wieku ok. 20-70 lat**, którzy chcieliby przeżyć przygodę na planie i wcielić się w role takie jak studenci AWF, reporterzy czy sportowcy. 

Zgłoszenia proszę wysyłać na maila: **agata@podtytulem.pl**

W tytule maila: **A21**

Zgłoszenie musi zawierać: imię i nazwisko, wiek, numer telefonu, miejscowość oraz **aktualne zdjęcie twarzy i sylwetki z dnia zgłoszenia**. 

ZDJĘCIE TWARZY: Portretowe selfie w dziennym świetle, na wprost, patrząc w obiektyw. Bez żadnych filtrów. Bez okularów. Bez nakrycia głowy. Kolorowe. 

Widzimy się na planie :)

items.text:
SKUESPILLERE SØGES TIL KORTFILM I VEJLE 🎥
Vi søger to unge skuespillere til en kortfilm, der skal optages i Vejle.
Roller vi søger:
 Ung mand  – alder 18–20 år
 Ung kvinde  – alder 18–20 år
Vi ser gerne, at du har lidt skuespilerfaring, men det vigtigste er, at du har lyst til at være med i et kreativt filmprojekt.
Optagelser:
 📍Vejle
 📆Dato oplyses ved henvendelse
Praktisk info:
Projektet er ulønnet, men der vil være mad og snacks på settet, og du får en fed oplevelse med filmproduktion samt mulighed for at udvide dit netværk.
Interesseret?
Send en besked med:
• Navn
• Alder
• Et billede af dig selv
• Eventuel skuespilerfaring
Vi glæder os til at høre fra jer! 🎬

items.text:
Hi guys! 

Posting for a second time as we’re still on the hunt! Also have slightly more info to share. Please read below carefully and send me a message if you fit the profile and are interested in auditioning. 

I’m urgently casting for a new TV series shooting in London from the end of May. 

I need a young white male 18 - 24. You need to be funny, wild and a rule breaker. AGE is really important!!! They also need to be from London. The more authentic the better! 

Also looking for another male actor 18 - 21 for another role in the same show. This character is an estate agent with much higher ambitions. Slightly reserved but willing to bend rules to get the job done. 

Please comment below or send me a DM for more info. We are casting urgently so need to move fairly quickly. Free agents are preferable but not necessary. Get in touch asap!!

items.text:
*CASTING CALL*

My name is Raife Barber and I am a third year FIlm Production Student at the University of Winchester. We are currently hiring for both leads of our film “Aberration”. Shooting starts 30th March to the 2nd April, and then shooting 7th-9th April.

Synopsis: Aberration is about a young man called Elliot who discovers a gift to go back into old polaroid photos. This cosmic gift allows him to learn more about himself on the night of his Secondary School Prom, and about his relationship with his best friend Aidan who passed away shortly after the event. The film covers themes of grief and identity.

For the role of Elliot: Elliot is a passive character in his life. He does not fit the defined mold for masculinity. When his friend Aidan passed away his whole life flipped upside down. He now no longer fits in with his group of friends alongside this his relationship with his mum has become heavily fractured. As people around him begin moving into this new stage of life they become alien to him this causes him to become alienated.

For the role of Aidan: Aidan has always been a popular kid. He fell into a masculine friend group that treated him very well. He became close to Elliot late into his time at school however they quickly became thick as thieves. Aidan always felt close to Elliot however he began to realise his true romantic feelings for him as their friendship blossomed. Aidan repressed this fact until it became too much to bear where he pushed himself away from Elliot. 

Shortly after this incident he passed away in a cycling accident late at night. He would never reach 18.

Elliot and Aidan are late teenagers/early adults, and we will be casting anyone who can convincingly pay those ages. Both these roles will be ‘unpaid’ however all travel expenses will be paid for and food will be provided. We are filming in various locations in-and-around Winchester. 

Please feel to message me at: **[Raifebarber05@Gmail.com](mailto:Raifebarber05@Gmail.com)****, **or at **[Aberration.shortfilm@Gmail.com](mailto:Aberration.shortfilm@Gmail.com)****. **I look forward to hearing from everyone!

Jeg kan ikke holde op med at lave sandwichbrød! Ingen æltning, ingen æg, intet smør! Så bløde og lækre, at mine kolleger bliver ved med at bede mig om at piske dem sammen! 
Dette enkle sandwichbrød er let, luftigt og perfekt til ethvert måltid. Med blot et par enkle ingredienser har du frisk, hjemmelavet brød uden besværet!
Opskrift i kommentarerne. 

Jeg sendte den til dem, der takkede mig

📣 Casting Call!
Currently seeking background actors/extras for a well-known production company/label. The shoot (non-union, unpaid) will be in Los Angeles, 3/14, with copy, credit, & meals provided! 

Seeking: 
• 10 M or F, any race/ethnicity (21-60), to act as high-art enthusiasts, art gallery attendees (10-6 PM) 
•  5 M or F, any race/ethnicity to play as art gallery staff, or (2) waiters (10 - 6 PM) 
• 1 F, BIPOC performer, (20s), (~ 6-10 PM). 

Subject of your email: Short - 3/14 - [Position] - Name. 

Please email your resume, headshot, & position(s) interested in, to riannamamitag1@gmail.com !

UWAGA MAZURY!!!!!
CASTING ON LINE DO GŁÓWNEJ ROLI DZIECIĘCEJ!!!!!
Jeżeli Chcesz przeżyć niesamowitą przygodę, zobaczyć jak wygląda praca na planie filmowym i wystąpić z największymi gwiazdami  kina to w miesiącach kwiecień, maj, czerwiec  będziemy realizować zdjęcia do serialu produkcji niemiecko-polskiej "Der Masuren Krimi".
Do głównej roli dziecięcej poszukujemy dziewczynki o blond włosach w wieku ok.9 lat
Stawka ustalana jest indywidualnie
Zdjęcia odbędą się na Mazurach
Zgłoszenia z dopiskiem DZIEWCZYNKA zawierające imię i nazwisko,  aktualne (ZROBIONE DZISIAJ!!!!) zdjęcie twarzy (bez nakrycia głowy) i aktualne zdjęcie sylwetki oraz numer telefonu opiekuna prosimy przesyłać na maila:
mario@mkmstudiofilm.pl
Prosimy też o nie ingerencję w fryzury i wygląd zewnętrzny.
Z wybraną dziewczynką będziemy kontaktować się telefonicznie.
Poczuj magię kina razem z nami.
OJ BĘDZIE SIĘ DZIAŁO!!!!!
Serdecznie Zapraszamy
Załoga MKM Studio

items.text:
Hi Everyone!  SpectraLive (x) is casting for Los Angeles local talent to perform as licensed super hero characters and dancers this summer at Six Flags parks around the country! The production rehearses and opens in Los Angeles in mid-May and employment continues through the end of August.  

Auditions will we be held at Six Flags Magic Mountain on March 22 and 23. Please see the attached flyer for more information and to sign up: [https://tinylink.net/yTMIU](https://tinylink.net/yTMIU)

Looking forward to seeing you there!

items.text:
🎥 Content Creators / Actors Needed – Cannabis Brand Shoot (San Diego)
We’re looking for male and female content creators / actors (ages 18–30) for upcoming shoots with a cannabis brand. PAID 

📅 Shoot Dates:

• March 22

• March 23

• March 24

These are separate shoot days, not a full 3-day commitment.

If any one of these days works for you, please reach out ASAP.

🎬 What we’re filming:

• Skits

• Promo videos

• Social media content

• Talking-to-camera style videos

We’re looking for people who are comfortable on camera and can speak naturally and confidently.

Ideal candidates:

• Content creators or people experienced making social media videos

• Comfortable speaking to camera

• Good personality and natural on camera

• Comfortable acting in skits

• Bonus if you smoke cannabis (makes product shoots easier)

📩 To apply:

Text 858-753-5927 with:

• Your name + age

• Photos of yourself

• Links to reels / TikTok / past content

Location: San Diego

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL – JOHANNESBURG / PRETORIA ACTORS 🎬
Hi everyone! I’m casting for a short-form comedy web series called Anomalies Anonymous.

👻 Anomalies Anonymous is a mockumentary-style comedy about supernatural beings attending a support group to deal with the challenges of living among humans.

The series follows characters like a fruitarian vampire, a vegan werewolf, a gorgon who struggles with eye contact, a dragon with anger issues, and a ghost who accidentally scares people.

📍 Details:

• Independent short-form comedy series

• Episodes approx. 1 minute long (for social media)

• Filming in Johannesburg / Pretoria

• Unpaid passion project

• Great opportunity for showreel footage and comedic material

🎭 Characters:

🧛 Popovici – vampire

🐺 Gregory – werewolf

🐍 Elena – gorgon

🐉 Iggy – dragon

👻 Sipho – ghost

👤 Daniel – invisible man (voice role)

📩 Interested?

Email me for the audition packet and sides:

caraleanespence17@gmail.com

Feel free to share with actors who might be interested!

✨ Looking forward to hearing from you!

items.groupTitle: Casting For Artists&Dancers Travel All Over The World

items.text:
Hi everyone,
I’m an independent UK-based artist currently filming a Bollywood/Punjabi-style music video for my original song “Dil De De.”

I’m looking for a few volunteer background dancers who would like to be part of the video and join the choreography with our lead dancers.

This is a fun collaborative project, and dancers will receive:

• full credit in the music video

• behind-the-scenes content for social media

• video footage they can use for their own portfolios or reels.

The shoot will be a one-day filming session in London on 28th March. 

If you enjoy Bollywood, Punjabi or Desi dance and would like to take part, I would love to hear from you. Feel free to message me and I can share more details about the project and the song.

Thanks so much!

Sapna

items.groupTitle: Casting For Artists&Dancers Travel All Over The World
items.title: (no title)

items.text:
Hallo zusammen,

für einen globalen Werbespot mit globalen Nutzungsrechten sind wir aktuell auf der Suche nach einer vierköpfigen Familie.

Es handelt sich um einen Werbespot für einen Drohnen-Controller. Der Dreh ist rein visuell und fängt natürliche Familienmomente im Lifestyle-Kontext ein.

**Gesucht werden:**
* Mama
* Papa
* Junge (8–13 Jahre)
* Mädchen (8–13 Jahre)

**Wichtige Voraussetzungen:**
* Keine sichtbaren Tattoos
* Keine Piercings

**Drehort: Südbayern und Innsbruck**

**Drehtage: **
* **2 Drehtage (Outdoor)**
* **Anreise am Abend vor dem ersten Drehtag**
* **Drehschluss am zweiten Drehtag nach Sonnenuntergang**
* **Drehzeitraum: Zwischen 17.03.-25.03.**

Bei Interesse gerne Fotos, Angebot, Alter und Wohnort an: contact@sindynelia.de

Vielen Dank und liebe Grüße
Sindy Tekieli

topComments.text: Eine wichtige Angaben des Honorares fehlt noch!!

items.text:
Protagonist gesucht in Berlin! 

Für einen niederländischen Fernsehbeitrag suche ich jemanden, der medizinisches Cannabis bei Online-Ärzten bestellt und bereit ist, über Ihre Erfahrungen zu sprechen (Deutsch/Englisch). 

Bitte senden Sie mir eine private Nachricht.

items.title: Protagonist gesucht in Berlin!

items.text:
🎭 LAST MINUTE – URGENT CASTING CALL
Read All Information Before Applying

[PROJECT DESCRIPTION]

A bold new theatre stage production currently in development that will later transition into a Drama Series streaming on major Streaming Television platforms.

What it's About? 

A gritty, fast-paced contemporary thriller exploring the realities of modern life. The story dives deep into powerful human emotions including greed, envy, hatred, love, betrayal, and the pursuit of peace, delivering an intense and emotionally charged narrative designed for both stage and screen.

Each character is inspired by raw, everyday realities, bringing authenticity and depth to the performance.

Creative Tone References:

Projects with a similar grounded tone include films such as Ill Manors, City of Lights, Fish Tank, Everywhere & Nowhere, and Sugarush.

This project is being developed with a clear pathway towards an on-screen drama series aimed at major platforms including:

Netflix, Amazon Studios, Apple TV+, A24, Sky Studios, Facebook Watch, HBO, Hulu, Film4, Paramount+, Pluto TV, Plex, Mubi and ITV Studios.

🎬 ROLE |

Gender: Female

Age Range: 20's to 30's

White/Caucasian

Personality: Wild, free-spirited, bubbly, energetic City Girl

A vibrant young woman navigating the emotional chaos of city life

This role requires someone comfortable with improvisational acting and natural emotional expressions.

You aren't required to learn a script. Cast will be provided with:

A Character Backstory

A short Monologue to help you begin the performance

Improvisation guidance will be given by the Director during rehearsals

🎭 PERFORMANCE DETAILS |

Theatre Stage Performance Date:

📅 23rd March 2026

⏰ 5:00 PM

📍 UK, London

🎬 REHEARSAL DETAILS |

Rehearsals will take place in group sessions with the Director and Acting Coach.

📅 17th March 2026 – 6:30 PM

📅 22nd March 2026 – 6:30 PM

⏱ Duration: Approx. 30-40 minutes each session

📍 Camden Studio 

Further production development and rehearsal sessions may continue March–September 2026.

💰 COMPENSATION |

This production begins as a development stage play, forming the foundation for a television series adaptation.

Full production budgets and funding will be secured once the on-screen series phase moves forward onto the next stage.

This is an opportunity to join a project Early and Grow with it.

Patience and long-term vision are essential.

🌟 WHO SHOULD APPLY?

We are looking for someone who is:

Based in UK, London (Strictly ONLY)

Reliable and serious about acting

Available for the performance and rehearsals

Comfortable performing with improvisation

Open to training and development

Experience is welcome but not required.

Applicants who get selected will receive ongoing coaching, training, and mentorship to help develop them into a working professional acting brand.

📩 HOW TO APPLY?

Send The Following via Inbox OR E-Mail:

- Full Name

- Age

- Location

- Headshot and Portfolio If You Own One

- Contact Number 

- Social Media Handles (if any)

Short Introduction About Yourself Why You Want to Join As The Cast

Acting Experience (if any)

Applications will be reviewed immediately due to urgent casting requirements.

⚠️ Serious applicants Only. Availability for the dates listed is essential.

You will be sent credentials of the company and the services we provide of those who apply.

E-Mail Address: Ahmedsy_jaber@hotmail.com

items.text:
Hello all, very short notice and id be surprised if anyone is available but were currently looking for extras to attend a scene of a gathering in a pub for an England match. This is for our big dissertation uni film. We are unfortunately on a tight budget but it would be much appreciated if anyone could attend.

Casting call on Wednesday the 18th, 8:00am at the The Bell, Bell Road in East Molesey

Please contact me for more details if available, thanks!

items.text:
Situation Vacant at Popeye Village Malta - Animators to Play the role of Popeye the Sailor (the character)

 

**BONUS - WE DO NOT WORK EVENINGS (lastest work till 6.00 p.m.)**

 

Skills Required:
* Has ACTING Background
* Can Dance
* Able to play different roles
* Very Energetic
* Can do a number of voices for puppet shows
* Has to be very polite with customers
* Greet customers daily

Requirements:
* One's Physical Features have to match the Character played
* Fluent in Spoken English
* Has Acting Experience
* Able to move to Malta
* Able to work outside in a Mediterranean Climate
* Team Player

**Offering Seasonal and YEARLY contracts.**

 

**Interested applicants are to send their C.V. on hr@popeyemalta.com or via WhatsApp on +35699231573 and**

**MUST Have E.U. Passport / I.D. Card**

attachments.ocrText: No photo description available.

items.text:
🚨 CASTING ALERT! CASTING ALERT! 🚨
A major television network is now casting couples nationwide for a relationship court show.

We are seeking:

    •    Couples and married couples

    •    People in relationships with children

    •    Individuals and couples facing real relationship or family challenges

If you or someone you know is:

    •    Dealing with issues in a marriage or relationship

    •    Interested in a DNA test or lie detector test

    •    Ready to share their story and seek real answers

👉 We want to hear from you!

💰 COMPENSATION & PERKS:

    •    $1,200 per couple ($600 each)

    •    Round-trip airfare provided

    •    All testing and counseling costs covered

📩 For more details or questions, feel free to inbox.

📝 How to apply:

Click the link below to apply ⬇️

https://seekingmarriedlongtermcouplesinrelationshipsnationwidecasting.castingcrane.com/

🎬⚖️ Nationwide casting now open!

items.text:
If you’re looking for a place where you can unlock your potential, boost your confidence, push your boundaries, and improve the talent you have, to get you where you want to be in your career as an actor, and ultimately capture the attention of casting directors, then join us at, officially, the best drama school in the North-West…………….Marble Academy! 

Marble Academy is a multi-award-winning drama school, recognised as the **Best Drama School of the Year 2025 (Manchester & North-West Prestige Awards, **and** E2 Media Awards), **but also, for two years running, has been a finalist for the **UK Small Business Awards 2025 and 2026 (Best Small Business)**, representing the Manchester area.

And it doesn’t stop there: we are also endorsed by Spotlight, the UK’s leading casting platform, for its high standards of training. Which means you are eligible to join Spotlight after just two years of training with us.

Our classes take place every Monday evening from 7 pm to 9 pm in Swinton, Manchester. 

We offer a career-focused three-year course for actors who want to work in film, TV, and theatre.

If you’d like to move forward, would like more information or read some testimonials, don’t hesitate to take a look at our website: [www.marbleacademy.co.uk](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.marbleacademy.co.uk%2F%3Ffbclid%3DIwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExbTF1QW8yeFlXV0NyNjVrSXNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR6GYJA9knsuazvVDV2pUropzKHnIPlMkjY56jtJTCjuBfGIgmxc-ws4uRh70A_aem_ls3R1ZZQau7TvFk1nTkbWw&h=AT5r6P5AZFo4X3Xu4a_TO11vhzDPRrqDOtRLZ6cyGPez0FsJs6N_A3NIwZNkb-AEx19qmpTaXVUAaRPEdIshZkbY66zHfhW9Q2qnXd3RkSFVTeqEAfJhaozaK1T3CtbUmwcuSAfK9amCxWB8pTbdD6Dgzkb08ZMaIw&__tn__=-UK-R&c[0]=AT715udcsKZ5c-yFqIn77Pq25SRyuKQaIEdqli2LobO-7GeT79RzpjOQwRZBwx_QmdhZO8-cBRSvmsthVgzNN3LNvc8y9-2TKGNqA3-8mwcKnDpUKKffr-ruwGREzoM02ZlRJKsmbPu1nhoWruK0SqndIaR_Q7rv8ydZzh2mLrAefrzu988kDOmc9fkuYuDQ9TO3GwGKe3NY0_VXOcdp-u3FoMqN0zNC), or get in touch via our email address: marbleacademy@hotmail.com

items.text:
*CASTING CALL*

My name is Raife Barber and I am a third year FIlm Production Student at the University of Winchester. We are currently hiring for both leads of our film “Aberration”. Shooting starts 30th March to the 2nd April, and then shooting 7th-9th April.

Synopsis: Aberration is about a young man called Elliot who discovers a gift to go back into old polaroid photos. This cosmic gift allows him to learn more about himself on the night of his Secondary School Prom, and about his relationship with his best friend Aidan who passed away shortly after the event. The film covers themes of grief and identity.

For the role of Elliot: Elliot is a passive character in his life. He does not fit the defined mold for masculinity. When his friend Aidan passed away his whole life flipped upside down. He now no longer fits in with his group of friends alongside this his relationship with his mum has become heavily fractured. As people around him begin moving into this new stage of life they become alien to him this causes him to become alienated.

For the role of Aidan: Aidan has always been a popular kid. He fell into a masculine friend group that treated him very well. He became close to Elliot late into his time at school however they quickly became thick as thieves. Aidan always felt close to Elliot however he began to realise his true romantic feelings for him as their friendship blossomed. Aidan repressed this fact until it became too much to bear where he pushed himself away from Elliot. 

Shortly after this incident he passed away in a cycling accident late at night. He would never reach 18.

Elliot and Aidan are late teenagers/early adults, and we will be casting anyone who can convincingly pay those ages. Both these roles will be ‘unpaid’ however all travel expenses will be paid for and food will be provided. We are filming in various locations in-and-around Winchester. 

Please feel to message me at: **[Raifebarber05@Gmail.com](mailto:Raifebarber05@Gmail.com)****, **or at **[Aberration.shortfilm@Gmail.com](mailto:Aberration.shortfilm@Gmail.com)****. **I look forward to hearing from everyone!

**Sesje tematyczne w Gliwicach z gadżetami i kostiumami!**

 

Zapraszam do Gliwic do mojego domowego mini studia foto na sesje tematyczne. Finalnie wychodzi  **od 15 do 20 zdjęć.** Do wyboru są 2 opcje tematyczne. Koszt takiej sesji to tylko **150 zł**. Posiadam na wyposażeniu mini studio z kilkoma tłami oraz lampami. Podpisuje również oświadczenie o wykonywanych zdjęciach w konkretny dzień sesji. Mam również duży wybór kostiumów i gadżetów do wykorzystywania:

 

- Kobieta mafii 1930

- wojenna partyzantka z 1940

- Wampirzyca

- Kapłanka egipska 

- Piratka

- Sensualne

- klasyczne

- Wiedzma

- Lara Croft

 

www.instagram.com/lukasz.magiera.official

 

Więcej informacji na Priv

items.text:
**045  Mini serial  1940 – ‘’ 2 Oficer Waffen SS  -  mężczyzna  (casting on-line )**

 

Nasza Gliwicka Grupa Pasjonatów **‘’Grupa1940’’** poszukuje  mężczyzny w wieku 30 – 40 do roli oficera Waffen SS . Szukamy osoby bez zarostu oraz tatuaży na twarzy. Postać będzie mieć kwestie po niemiecku. Mile widziana osoba z Gliwic lub okolic: Zabrza czy Katowic. Wystąpi w kilku odcinkach. Zdjęcia próbne realizujemy  w Gliwicach. Spotykamy się w wybrane niedziele z wyprzedzeniem 1 2 tygodniowym.  

 

**Od maja 2026 planujemy realizacje zdjęc do tego **projektu. Będziemy realizować mini serial oparty o wątki grupy okultystycznej ’’**Ahnenerbe’**’ która chce zdobyć słynne artefakty ale w tym ktoś im chce przeszkadzać. Projekt będzie  się składać z 6 odcinków po 10/12 minut każdy. Będziemy też sukcesywnie dodawać inne ogłoszenia związane z tym projektem. Mile widziane zdjęcia aktualne. Na zdjęciu powyżej osoba będzie mieć podobny kostium.** **Umieszczone materiały są z naszej sesji.** Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Od 01.04.25 założyliśmy swój kanał na portalu youtube z filmami z naszych planów żeby można było zobaczyć jak to u nas wygląda od kuchni. 

 

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCE8KyfwpyFGzzwUDqdwy74g

 

 

.** Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Więcej informacji na Priv

**Serial nie jest stworzony z sympatii do tej nazistowskiej organizacji lecz wynika to z samego scenariusza aby ukazał zbrodnie i sam fakt iż była w pełni zła. W produkcji znajdą się osoby, które będą chcieć walczyć i potępiać te wielkie zło jakim był nazizm. W oparciu o Dz.U.2017.0.2204 t.j. - Ustawa z dnia 6 czerwca 1997 r. - Kodeks karny,Art. 256 "Propagowanie faszyzmu lub innego ustroju totalitarnego lub nawoływanie domnienawiści", §3 - nie narusza prawa proponując przedmiot do celów historycznych lub kolekcjonerskich.**

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL — "Antelope Valley"

Seeking a male actor, ages 18–22, height 4'5"–5'4", with a youthful look.

ANTHONY, A restless, eager kid living in his older brother's shadow. He craves belonging and pushes hard to prove himself, but underneath the bravado is a sensitive, talented artist.

"Antelope Valley" is a narrative short set in the California high desert exploring brotherhood, loss, and identity. This is a proof of concept for a feature film, and the right actor will be considered for both.

💵 Pay: $250 flat

📅 Shoot dates: April 17, 18, or 19 (2-day shoot, afternoons & nights)

📍 Antelope Valley, CA | Simi Valley | 5/110 Freeway Interchange

Interested? Drop a comment or DM with your headshot, reel, and measurements.
