🎬 CASTING CALL — "Antelope Valley"

Seeking a male actor, ages 18–22, height 4'5"–5'4", with a youthful look.

ANTHONY, A restless, eager kid living in his older brother's shadow. He craves belonging and pushes hard to prove himself, but underneath the bravado is a sensitive, talented artist.

"Antelope Valley" is a narrative short set in the California high desert exploring brotherhood, loss, and identity. This is a proof of concept for a feature film, and the right actor will be considered for both.

💵 Pay: $250 flat

📅 Shoot dates: April 17, 18, or 19 (2-day shoot, afternoons & nights)

📍 Antelope Valley, CA | Simi Valley | 5/110 Freeway Interchange

Interested? Drop a comment or DM with your headshot, reel, and measurements.
items.title: 🎬 CASTING CALL — "Antelope Valley"

items.text:
Are you an aspiring actor or filmmaker looking to unleash your talent? We invite you to be part of our dynamic collective! Every Saturday, in Los Angeles we come together to collaborate and bring our cinematic visions to life, creating one high-quality movie each month. Our diverse group includes not just actors, but also passionate writers, skilled DOPs, talented production designers, prop masters, directors, and more. With access to fantastic locations, top-notch equipment, and an enthusiastic crew, we are dedicated to crafting movies that are not only of exceptional quality but also ready for the festival circuit. Become a part of a supportive community where your creativity can flourish!

If you're available and want to join a group of talented and passionate filmmakers, complete this form. https://forms.gle/zd737XUMFmhbXEQt8

items.text:
Hello! My name is Juniellia and I am a dancer/actress/director from NY/NJ looking to FINALLY produce and direct a film I wrote a few years ago. It’s a psychological drama with 1-3 locations, two of which can be worked around! There’s also just about 3 characters with lines and a few background, can still be worked around!

If anyone has any pointers for next steps or tips for the journey, would love to listen! 

(& also will be located in Cali until end of May, if anyone wants to help get it filmed while out here! suuuuuper open to making those connections 🙂

please comment or message me. thank you and I look forward to hearing y’all out 🫶🏽

topComments.text: The best advice I can give you is to raise money to produce your film, people look past that when it is, one of the most important steps if you want to do it right

items.text:
**Title:** Exit Wound 

**Genre:** Drama

**Logline:** A young man chooses between love and opportunity as he breaks news that could have devastating implications to his relationship over an anniversary dinner.

**Role: **RICK (30's-50's) Rick is confident, charismatic, and commanding but the charm masks deep insecurity. He clings to control as the only way he knows how to keep someone close. He fears abandonment but fears being truly seen even more.

**Director/Writer:** Gatlin Zbylski 

**Assistant Director: **Jack Brown

**Production Type:** Student Film

**Contact Information:** Please send all submissions to gatlinjack777@gmail.com. Either Director or Assistant Director will follow up with you.

**Run Time:** Short. 7-11 Minutes.

**Compensation: **Unpaid. Meal and Reel provided!

**Union Status: **Non-stop

**Audition Information:** Please send Headshot, Resume, and attached self-tape audition sides to gatlinjack777@gmail.com no later than ***Friday, 03/13/26 by 8PM. ***Reels accepted but not required.

**Shooting Schedule:** March 20th, night shoot. March 21st, day shoot begins in afternoon. Exact times TBD.

**Filming Location: **11553 Pink Phlox Drive Parker, Colorado 80134.

**Project Description: **Light intimacy (kissing) and combat (thrown dinner plate at other character) required for role. Any combat or matters of intimacy will be detailed in the Intimacy Consent Form, discussed in depth, and rehearsed to Actor's comfort level.

items.text:
CASTING DO LETNIEJ REKLAMY LODÓW – ZGŁOŚ SIĘ! 🍦

Szukamy charakterystycznych, naturalnych i różnorodnych osób w wieku 20–50 lat do udziału w letniej reklamie popularnych lodów. Jeśli masz ciekawą energię, lubisz dobrą zabawę przed kamerą i chcesz przeżyć fajną przygodę na planie – to ogłoszenie jest dla Ciebie!

💰 Stawki: 2500 – 4500 zł brutto z prowizją Agencji
📅 Plan zdjęciowy: 1–2 dni
⏰ Termin nadsyłania zgłoszeń: sobota 14.03 do godz. 13:00

👥 Kogo szukamy?

Role drugoplanowe

3 znajomych przy Żabce (20–30 lat) – pozytywna ekipa w stylu gen-z, różniąca się wyglądem i stylem.

Osoba przy „gibańcu” (23–45 lat) – mężczyzna z komediowym vibe’em, poczuciem rytmu i umiejętnościami tanecznymi.

Kobieta w ogrodzie (30–40 lat) – promienista, naturalna, z ciepłą energią.

Role epizodyczne

Paź (25–55 lat) – bardzo charakterystyczny mężczyzna o wyjątkowym wyglądzie.

Zapaśnik (20–50 lat) – potężna sylwetka, kulturysta lub ktoś o imponującym wzroście.

5 „gibających się ludzi” (23–45 lat) – kobiety i mężczyźni z dobrą koordynacją ruchową, mile widziane umiejętności taneczne lub gimnastyczne.

📩 Zgłoszenie powinno zawierać:

• imię i nazwisko
• wiek
• wzrost
• zdjęcie portretowe
• zdjęcie sylwetki

🎥 Wizytówkę wideo, w której:

przedstawisz się (imię, wiek, wzrost),

opowiesz o swoich zainteresowaniach,

na końcu pokażesz dłonie z obu stron oraz oba profile twarzy.

🎥 Zadania castingowe

💃 Role: Osoba przy gibańcu / Gibający się ludzie
Nagraj krótki taniec do muzyki A$AP Rocky inspirowany ruchami „gibańców” – tych długich dmuchanych postaci, które falują na wietrze przy festynach i reklamach.

🍦 Role: Znajomi przy Żabce / Kobieta w ogrodzie / Paź / Zapaśnik 
Nagraj krótkie wideo, na którym jesz swojego ulubionego loda (najlepiej Kaktusa). Pokaż emocje, dłonie, usta i oczy:
• Paź – komediowo
• Zapaśnik – groźnie lub humorystycznie
• Pozostałe role – wesoło i lekko

Pamiętajcie, że filmiki zamieszczamy na YouTube w wersji niepublicznej / każda osoba mająca link 🙂

Jak się zgłosić?

Wyślij zgłoszenie:
📧 mailowo: casting@unagimedia.pl
➡️ w tytule maila wpisz: „002”

lub przez formularz:
📝 https://forms.gle/67TFqwfgnQZpHktaA

Masz ciekawą energię i chcesz pojawić się w letniej kampanii reklamowej?✨ 
Nie zwlekaj! Wyślij zgłoszenie i spróbuj swoich sił przed kamerą! 🍦🌞

P.S. Skontaktujemy się z wybranymi osobami / przekażemy szczegóły

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of gelato and text that says 'CASTING DO LETNIEJ reklamy lodów ZGŁOŚ SIĘ! AASEAS STAWKI: 2500-4500zł 4500 2500- PLAN: 1-2 1-2DNI DNI ZGŁOSZENIA DO: 14 MARCA Szukamy osób W wieku 20-50lat! lat!'

items.text:
Casting Call for the https://wssf.com/ 72hr Film Maker Showdown. **Title:**72 film fest submission.

**Format:** Short Film

**Union:** Non-Union

**Location:** Whistler, BC 

**Production:** Created for the [Whistler Ski and Snowboard Festival](chatgpt://generic-entity?number=0) 72-Hour Filmmaker Showdown

**Shoot Dates:** March 27–28, 2026

**Compensation:** Volunteer / Copy & Credit

Transportation from Vancouver will be provided Friday and Saturday if needed.

**Production Note**

This project is being produced as part of a **72-hour film competition** and will be created on an accelerated schedule.

Our goal is to keep the shoot **organized, collaborative, and enjoyable**. While the timeline is tight, this will not be a "run-and-gun chaosproduction". The focus is on having fun, working together creatively, and ensuring everyone walks away with **a strong piece for their reel**, regardless of the competition’s final outcome.

Our team **won this event many years ago**, and we’re excited to return for the **30th anniversary** of the WSSF. 

*This note will be updated as roles are filled.*

⸻

**ROLES**

**DYLAN — LEAD**

Male, **25–55** ( flexible) 

Confident, intense, and charismatic. Dylan carries himself like someone completely certain of his place in the world and speaks with unwavering conviction.Charismatic, stubborn, and relentlessly self-assured.The character should be played with total sincerity — the humour comes from how seriously Dylan takes himself.Actor should be comfortable with subtle physical performance and strong deadpan delivery.

⸻

**JOSEPH  — SUPPORTING**

Male, **45–70** (flexible)

An eccentric intellectual type with a calm, thoughtful presence. Joseph speaks slowly and deliberately, often with philosophical weight behind his words.Dry, deadpan delivery and strong character instincts preferred.

**SUBMISSION INSTRUCTIONS**

Please submit:

• Headshot

• Resume

• Demo reel (if available)

Selected actors will be contacted with short audition sides for a self-tape. Feel free to reach out via email with any questions.

**Subject Line:**

[ROLE NAME] – [ACTOR NAME]

**Send submissions to:**

72hourfilm2026@gmail.com

**Submission Deadline:**

March 17th

topComments.text: Thanks to everyone for the submissions so far, looking foreward to going them this weekend!
If you need a female actress!

items.text:
Subject: Funding Producer / Director Opportunity – Blind Can’t Hear
I am seeking a Funding Producer and Director for a compelling feature film project, Blind Can’t Hear, with a Lionsgate theatrical distribution opportunity attached.

Blind Can’t Hear is a character-driven indie drama about Jessica Kwame, a sharp-tongued biracial teenager struggling with trauma, neurological tics, and life in a collapsing trailer-park home while her parents spiral through addiction. When she meets Sean, a homeless musician on parole trying to rebuild his life, their unlikely bond forces them both to confront their past and learn to trust someone for the first time.

The film blends dark humor, romance, and social realism, living in the emotional space of Silver Linings Playbook and Precious.

items.summary:
Subject: Funding Producer / Director Opportunity – Blind Can’t Hear
I am seeking a Funding Producer and Director for a compelling feature film project, Blind Can’t Hear, with a Lionsgate theatrical distribution opportunity attached.

Blind Can’t Hear is a character-driven indie drama about Jessica Kwame, a sharp-tongued biracial teenager struggling with trauma, neurological tics, and life in a collapsing trailer-park home while her parents spiral through addiction. When she meets Sean, a homeless musician on parole trying to rebuild his life, their unlikely bond forces them both to confront their past and learn to trust someone for the first time.

The film blends dark humor, romance, and social realism, living in the emotional space of Silver Linings Playbook and Precious.
items.title: Subject: Funding Producer / Director Opportunity – Blind Can’t Hear

TITLE & TYPE: Product Unboxing Videos – Online Content / Commercial Style (Short Form)

CASTING: Creators comfortable on camera (Actors / UGC Creators welcome), Age 18–35 preferred, All genders

LOCATION: Remote (U.S. Based)

COMPENSATION: Free product(s) valued up to $50 + $25 per 30–40 second video

CONTACT: ops@verdikalpass.com

TIME(s): Rolling submissions. Production begins immediately after selection.

ANYTHING ELSE:
We are building a new product discovery platform where creators film short unboxing videos for partner brands. Current products pet supplies, vitamins, CDB products, perfume/cologne, workout gear...etc

items.text:
# JOIN OUR VOICE ACTING PODCAST

We are voice actors who improv roleplay as characters going on adventures. Practice new voices! Go on quests! Face challenges! Solve mysteries! It's fun, and every episode we record also doubles as voice samples for your demo tape. We can send snippets demonstrating our character voices to anyone we'd like to hear it. Our gaming group plays a variety of tabletop roleplaying games and publishes the audio as a podcast. Tabletop roleplaying games add dice rolling to improv, giving us voice actors a way to simulate exploring an adventure. Would you enjoy acting as your character, joking around with friends, while playing games that double as demo reel recordings? Join us.
# System played:

We get to learn and play a different tabletop roleplaying game (ttrpg) system each session. There’s no financial burden to you. The systems are either free to everyone or we were sent a promotional copy from its creator. Because we record and publish the audio of our game sessions, indie game developers get an actual play episode to show their game being actually played. Anyone can listen to and hear an example of their system in action. Actual play episodes help more people see how a game is played, and maybe try it themselves. It's why creators send us their rules for free. That's why we’re a podcast. There isn't any money involved. We just do this for fun.

# When we play:

Weekends. Flexible times. Both European and American time zones. Joining us doesn't commit you to every weekend. Instead, we pick games we want to try and sign up for those calendar spots. Members can see who's playing and what ttrpg and pick which sessions they sign up for.

# How long we play / what it’s like:

Our members sit at their microphones for four hours talking their way through an adventure using their words and laughter to entertain each other. The GM says out loud how far away targets are instead of us all looking at combat maps on a screen. Each player sketches or constructs their own battle map on their desk in front of them, using their own minis. So you'll be able to use your minis every game you play. The recordings are high quality, and we air the audio as a podcast. Don’t worry, we don’t publish our names or faces.

# Oneshot or campaign:

Both. Like a oneshot, each individual episode opens with a beginning to its plot, and the exploration of its story ends after four hours. Like a traditional campaign, we repeatedly meet familiar non player characters (NPCs), facing challenges and experiencing long term character growth. Our members make one character for the yearlong campaign and adapt our same character to each ttrpg rule system. The characters are roleplayed so they can’t tell their players are rolling different dice each week. For them, it’s one continuous campaign. Characters are low power level in January, grow to epic max fighting strength by December, then retire.

# Game Mastering (GMing):

We rotate so that everyone is invited to be a player and a game master if they want. The GM gets to pick which ttrpg we play that weekend. If you find a fun ttrpg you want to try, you can sign up as the GM and be confident that there will be players excited to play with you. If you prefer to be a player every time that’s cool, too. Our members don't have to GM ever if they want a break from it. Getting to pick how often you GM really helps relieve burnout. GM as often as makes you happy.

# You can vibe check past games:

We're on itunes, spotify, youtube, and all the podcast apps. Our cast rotates. Skip around and listen to snippets from a few episodes to see which of our members you want to play with first. The episodes aren't all great, but we have fun together. This isn't a job. It's a hobby, a way to relax and laugh meeting new people who slowly over time become lifelong friends. It's okay to miss games; you aren’t expected to be present for every session. The opt-in format naturally minimizes table trouble because you can see who’s signed up to GM and play in a game before you join it, and can pick dates that have people you’re looking forward to playing with.

# Joining:

To join, email us at Firebreathing Kittens Podcast at gmail dot com telling us about your equipment. To make sure everyone’s voice sounds good, we use microphones that capture 24 bit audio. Don’t worry if you’re not sure what 24 bit audio means. Our equipment guide (Firebreathing Kittens Podcast dot com) explains what all the microphone words mean and lists affordable options, including mics under fifty bucks. We’ll help show you how to get set up so you can focus on playing. Firebreathing Kittens Podcast dot com also answers frequently asked questions about our format. Beginners welcome. Minimum age 21 years old. No experience necessary. We will guide you through character creation and train you how to record great audio.

items.text:
**🎬Casting Call! For a STUDENT FILM ‘Playback’🎬 URGENT!**

📍**LOCATION:** Hitchin

📆 **DATES:** Tuesday 17th March – Thursday 19th March

💵 **EXPENSES:** Travel and food expenses will be covered

 

**THERAPIST (Monica/Mark): **An **intelligent and compassionate** therapist who remains **calm** under the pressure of her recent client, Zak, who is certain that he sees things in his sleep. They stay **rational and grounded** around Zak - until unsettling evidence suggests something far more disturbing is happening, which results in a** subtle shift **from** confidence to quiet dread.**

**PLAYING AGE: 20+**

**GENDER: ANY**

 

**MOTHER/FATHER (Helen/Harry): **A **caring and devoted parent** of Zak who only wants the best for him, through finding it tough to stay strong and rational. Constantly trying to **talk it through** with Zak and questioning his apparent instability while conveying a **maternal instinct** yet a quiet, **emotional strain** as they see Zak spiralling out of control. 

**PLAYING AGE: 30+**

**GENDER: ANY**

 

**📖SYNOPSIS:** After coming face to face with a sinister figure in the middle of the night, Zak; a young man suffering with mental health issues (or so he’s been told), decides to film himself whilst he sleeps to prove that the figure is more than just an illusion. These odd behaviours are worrying to his **mother/father,** who want the best for him. After showing the footage to his **therapist** (who claims to see nothing), he decides that it is time to take things into his own hands. Instead of going to sleep, he waits for the figure to strike and deals a killing blow. Having caught it all on camera, he shows the proof to his **therapist,** who soon realises that the figure was Zak’s **mother/father** and that perhaps their next session should be separated by a prison cell...

 

Please email [playbacktalent@gmail.com](mailto:playbacktalent@gmail.com) if you are interested, or want further information, with a headshot and showreel if applicable! 😊

sharedPost.text:
🎙️ Dreaming of working in Animation and Games as a Voiceover Artist?

Look no further.

Check out our brilliant client Lizzy Byrne, an actively working professional VO artist who is making her mark in the industry. From character performance to dynamic storytelling, Lizzy is a fantastic example of what can be achieved with dedication, the right guidance and belief in your talent.

At PBL Voiceover Coach, we help aspiring and developing voice artists build the skills, confidence and industry awareness needed to break into professional voiceover work — including animation and gaming.

You too can leave your mark in the industry with the right coaching and self belief. All it takes is a spark ✨️ 

🎧 Start your journey today.
Book now at pblvoiceover.com
📩 Drop us a DM
📧 Email: pblvoiceover@gmail.com

#Voiceover #VoiceActing #AnimationVoiceover #GameVoiceActing #VoiceActor PBLVoiceover VoiceoverCoach Animation GamingVoiceover IrishVoiceover VoiceoverTraining 🎙️

🚲 CASTING CALL – BMX RIDERS | CAPE TOWN

We are scouting experienced BMX riders for a paid TV commercial shooting in Cape Town in late March 2026.

Requirements:
• Experienced BMX riders
• Men aged 18–24
• Open ethnicity

If you fit the brief or know someone who does, we would love to hear from you!

📩 Send your details to:
studio@zestcasting.com

⏳ Submission deadline: 16 March 2026

Tag a rider who should see this! 🔥
#bmx #bikeride #capetown #commercial

items.text:
VANCOUVER CASTING: The project is called Easy Money. We have actors that have worked on Avatar: The Last Airbender, Fire Country, and Mulan to name a few. Our DOP has done camera work on The Good Doctor. This is an independently funded project, so the actors will not be paid. We are going through the union under ULB. Please DM me your headshot, demo reel, resume, and socials. Only potential candidates will be contacted. Actors will receive footage and IMDB credit. 

Ryan 
Age: 30-50
Gender: Male
Description:
He is a businessman. Think The Wolf of Wall Street. He does blow to keep his energy up throughout the day.

Helen
Age: 40-58
Gender:  Female
Description:
By day, she is a bus driver, and by night, she gets high on crack.

Alisha
Age: 25-35
Gender: Female
Description: She is a sex worker who does heroin. She offers a sexual favor to Alex in exchange for drugs.

Gurvinder
Age: 25-40
Gender: Male
Description:
We are looking for an East Indian or someone who can play that. He is from Surrey and was a former high school soccer player. He is an obnoxious character. Very arrogant. He likes to party hard on the weekends by drinking Crown and snorting coke with his homies.

items.text:
Help me get the word out to families! I’ll be attaching a flyer—please feel free to share it with your database and post on social media.

If you know a teacher or mentor who would like to be featured, I’d love to connect with them as well.

Call or email me with any questions. Thank you for helping spread the word

Make sure they mention your program and my name when applying and I can fast track their applications straight to the producers 

 NOW CASTING! 

Know a curious kid who loves building, tinkering, coding, or experimenting?

A brand-new **Netflix competition series — Schooled! — from Mark Rober’s CrunchLabs is looking for bright young minds ages 9–17 to compete in teams of two for an INSANELY HUGE cash prize. 

 Creative thinkers

 Robotics lovers

 Problem solvers

 Hands-on builders

Kids can apply solo or with a partner (friend, classmate, sibling, or STEM teammate).

 Parents must apply with their kids.

Please share with your friends, family, followers — anyone who might know an amazing young inventor, builder, or future engineer.

Apply here: [https://crunchlabsacademy.com/](https://crunchlabsacademy.com/)

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL – TRAVEL COMMERCIAL 🌍✈️

We are looking for interesting people to appear in a travel commercial!

Roles we are looking for:
• Market vendor from Marrakesh
• Flamenco dancer
• Flamenco guitarist
• Street food cook using a wok (Thai cuisine)

🎤 Speaking roles – in your native language

📍 Shooting date: March 26 – Warsaw
💰 Rates:
• 1500 PLN – shooting day + 3000 PLN – usage rights (gross)

📩 Please send your application by next Monday to:
epizodysci.reklamy@gmail.com

🎬 CASTING CALL – TRAVEL COMMERCIAL 🌍✈️

We are looking for interesting people to appear in a travel commercial!

Roles we are looking for:
• Market vendor from Marrakesh
• Flamenco dancer
• Flamenco guitarist
• Street food cook using a wok (Thai cuisine)

🎤 Speaking roles – in your native language

📍 Shooting date: March 26 – Warsaw
💰 Rates:
• 1500 PLN – shooting day + 3000 PLN – usage rights (gross)

📩 Please send your application by next Monday to:
epizodysci.reklamy@gmail.com

Please include:
• a photo

• a showreel / short video (can be in any language)

sharedPost.text:
UWAGA MAZURY!!!!!
CASTING ON LINE DO GŁÓWNEJ ROLI DZIECIĘCEJ!!!!!
Jeżeli Chcesz przeżyć niesamowitą przygodę, zobaczyć jak wygląda praca na planie filmowym i wystąpić z największymi gwiazdami  kina to w miesiącach kwiecień, maj, czerwiec  będziemy realizować zdjęcia do serialu produkcji niemiecko-polskiej "Der Masuren Krimi".
Do głównej roli dziecięcej poszukujemy dziewczynki o blond włosach w wieku ok.9 lat
Stawka ustalana jest indywidualnie
Zdjęcia odbędą się na Mazurach
Zgłoszenia z dopiskiem DZIEWCZYNKA zawierające imię i nazwisko,  aktualne (ZROBIONE DZISIAJ!!!!) zdjęcie twarzy (bez nakrycia głowy) i aktualne zdjęcie sylwetki oraz numer telefonu opiekuna prosimy przesyłać na maila:
mario@mkmstudiofilm.pl
Prosimy też o nie ingerencję w fryzury i wygląd zewnętrzny.
Z wybraną dziewczynką będziemy kontaktować się telefonicznie.
Poczuj magię kina razem z nami.
OJ BĘDZIE SIĘ DZIAŁO!!!!!
Serdecznie Zapraszamy
Załoga MKM Studio

items.text:
**Szukam modelki  Gliwice/Katowice ( Śląsk )**

 

Szukam pań które nie krępują się własnego ciała i chciałaby mieć ciekawą pamiątkę w postaci klimatycznych zdjęć. Wiem jak bardzo jest ważna akceptacja własnego ciała bo przez to też możemy inaczej funkcjonować. Przez takie zdjęcia można również tego dokonać. Sesja w głównej mierze jest jako taki motywator.

 

Zapraszam do Gliwic do mojego domowego mini studia foto na sesje tematyczne. Finalnie wychodzi  **od 15 do 20 zdjęć.** Do wyboru są 2 opcje tematyczne. Koszt takiej sesji to tylko **150 zł**. Posiadam na wyposażeniu mini studio z kilkoma tłami oraz lampami. Podpisuje również oświadczenie o wykonywanych zdjęciach w konkretny dzień sesji. Mam również duży wybór kostiumów i gadżetów do wykorzystywania:

** **

**Temat 1 – ‘’Kobieta mafii 1930’’**

Postać kobiety osadzona w 1930 roku w roli bogatej kobiety, która trudni się gangsterstwem. Przewidziane są ujęcia m.in. przy stoliku na którym są pieniądze, wino, rewolwer. Tło jest wydrukowane w formie muru, cegieł. Motyw sensualny.

** **

**Temat 2 – ‘’Wampirzyca w baroku 1700’’**

Postać kobiety ubrana najpierw w suknie czarną oraz peleryne z kapturem. Do tego czarna długa peruka oraz czarne paznokcie. W kolejnym etapie sesji motyw sensualny.

** **

**Temat 3 – ‘’Duchy lasu’’**

Postać kobiety ubrana w wianek i w pelerynę z otwartym przodem. W dłoni ma zakrwawiony sierp. Usta czarne oraz paznokcie.

** **

**Temat 4 – ‘’Kleopatra’’**

Postać kobiety z czarna peruką w stylu Kleopatry. W prawej recę trzymac będzie berło Anubisa a w drugiej ręcę księgę umarłych. Na biodrach będzie mieć jedynie klasyczne odzienie z 2 części. Na klatce piersiowej założony będzie napierśnik złoty.

** **

**Temat 5 – ‘’Odważna Piratka ‘’**

Postać kobiety ubrana w strój piracki: kamizelka, koszula, kapelusz, spodnie i kapelusz a do tego rekwizyty pistolet czy kufel piwa.

 

**Temat 6 – ‘’Lara Croft ‘’**

Postać kobiety wzorowanej z tytułowej gry Tomb Rider Lary Croft.  Kobiete będzie przebywać w swojej bazie i badać nowe znaleziska pod lupą.

 

** **

**Zapraszam na stronę**

** **

**Facebook Łukasz Magiera – Fotografia**

www.instagram.com/lukasz.magiera.official

Więcej informacji na Priv
